title: More than 100,000 illegal cockroaches were seized from an Australian breeder | AP News
og:description: Australian officials say they confiscated more than 100,000 illegal live cockroaches from a breeder in May in the country's largest-ever seizure of exotic invertebrates.
og:title: Australian cockroach kingpin caught with 100,000 illegal insects in record bug bust
jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/illegal-cockroaches-seized-australia-madagascar-hissing-dubia-e35889bf7910169f6bd091e34b35e029","dateModified":"2026-06-05T06:27:21Z","datePublished":"2026-06-05T04:48:51Z","description":"Australian officials say they confiscated more than 100,000 illegal live cockroaches from a breeder in May in the country's largest-ever seizure of exotic invertebrates. The cockroaches were being sold online as reptile food. Officials urged pet owners to use crickets or wood roaches instead. The seized cockroaches will be euthanized, and authorities warned of prosecutions for those caught with such invertebrates. title: Half of Latin Americans deported from US to Congo return home | AP News
og:description: More than half the 15 Latin Americans deported to Congo under the Trump administration's immigration crackdown have returned to their home countries.

title: Federal judge overturns Trump administration policy affecting immigrants | AP News
og:description: A federal judge has struck down a Trump administration policy enacted after the shooting of two National Guard members that made it harder for immigrants from dozens of countries to stay and enter the country.

title: Man sentenced to life in 'au pair affair' murder case | AP News

og:title: Virginia man gets life in prison for double murder scheme in affair with au pair

title: Senate OKs $70B immigration enforcement bill without Trump fund limits | AP News
og:description: The Senate has passed legislation to fund President Donald Trump’s immigration enforcement agencies, sending it to the House.
og:title: Senate OKs $70B immigration bill after rejecting efforts to permanently ban Trump's settlement fund
jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/trump-settlement-fund-ice-border-patrol-vote-93b9f5b487997b629d87bf59a046d7ec","dateModified":"2026-06-05T15:11:59Z","datePublished":"2026-06-05T05:20:37Z","description":"The Senate has passed legislation to fund President Donald Trump’s immigration enforcement agencies, sending it to the House. The Friday morning passage came after weeks of delays and fierce backlash to an unrelated $1.776 billion settlement fund that threatened to derail the bill. Senators voted for the $70 billion legislation to fund Immigration and Customs Enforcement and Border Patrol for the next three years, through the end of Trump’s term. The final vote came after Republicans narrowly defeated multiple attempts to add language to the bill that would permanently ban Trump’s settlement fund to compensate allies who believe they've been politically persecuted. title: Rights lawyers challenge Equatorial Guinea over migrant deportations | AP News
og:description: Rights lawyers have filed a case against Equatorial Guinea before Africa’s top human rights body. They accuse the nation of forcing deportees from the United States back to their home countries in violation of their rights.
og:title: Case filed against Equatorial Guinea for sending US deportees to nations where they face persecution
jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/equatorial-guinea-trump-administration-deportations-2f31af949e0c2271781f25ebda8785df","dateModified":"2026-06-05T12:34:35Z","datePublished":"2026-06-05T11:20:56Z","description":"Rights lawyers have filed a case against Equatorial Guinea before Africa’s top human rights body. They accuse the nation of forcing deportees from the United States back to their home countries in violation of their rights. The filing asks the African Commission on Human and Peoples’ Rights to order Equatorial Guinea to halt deportations and improve detention conditions. It also seeks compensation for those already returned. The case involves 14 African migrants deported from the U.S. between November 2025 and April 2026. Advocates call this a landmark case that could pressure African governments accepting U.S. deportees.","image":[{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"ImageObject","height":653,"thumbnailUrl":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/5dbd882/2147483647/strip/false/crop/8640x5760+0+0/resize/980x653!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.apnews.com%2F29%2F59%2Fb5bfcb352bd06692580e4fabc14b%2F04d4adb34a1249c78c4b5f1484ac1de5","url":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/5dbd882/2147483647/strip/false/crop/8640x5760+0+0/resize/980x653!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.apnews.com%2F29%2F59%2Fb5bfcb352bd06692580e4fabc14b%2F04d4adb34a1249c78c4b5f1484ac1de5","width":980}],"name":"Rights lawyers challenge Equatorial Guinea over migrant deportations | AP News","mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://apnews.com/article/equatorial-guinea-trump-administration-deportations-2f31af949e0c2271781f25ebda8785df"},"author":[{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"Person","description":"Banchereau covers 22 countries across West and Central Africa for The Associated Press. title: A gay asylum-seeker lives in 'constant fear' after a third-country deportation | AP News
og:description: A woman who sought asylum in the United States after fleeing a country where homosexuality is illegal says the Trump administration's third-country deportation system sent her to another one.
og:title: The US deported a gay asylum-seeker to a third country where homosexuality is illegal
jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/trump-deportation-cameroon-morocco-lgbt-interview-1ea278f4c981df798773e26972c5d54f","dateModified":"2026-02-22T13:28:17Z","datePublished":"2026-02-22T05:07:31Z","description":"A woman who sought asylum in the United States after fleeing a country where homosexuality is illegal says the Trump administration's third-country deportation system sent her to another one. She spoke to The Associated Press from her home country of Morocco, where she said she is in hiding. Lawyers verified parts of her story and said she and others sent to Cameroon earlier this year were given “impossible choices.” The U.S. Department of Homeland Security has confirmed deportations there but didn't respond to questions. Cameroon is one of several African nations in third-country deportation deals.","image":[{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"ImageObject","height":653,"thumbnailUrl":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/9719508/2147483647/strip/false/crop/4843x3228+0+0/resize/980x653!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.apnews.com%2F9e%2Fab%2Ff069fef15b271d4c8d36bb09b039%2Fd6e7e10281b14610a6a4aceec9b5a308","url":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/9719508/2147483647/strip/false/crop/4843x3228+0+0/resize/980x653!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.apnews.com%2F9e%2Fab%2Ff069fef15b271d4c8d36bb09b039%2Fd6e7e10281b14610a6a4aceec9b5a308","width":980}],"name":"A gay asylum-seeker lives in 'constant fear' after a third-country deportation | AP News","mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://apnews.com/article/trump-deportation-cameroon-morocco-lgbt-interview-1ea278f4c981df798773e26972c5d54f"},"author":[{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"Person","description":"Pronczuk covers 22 countries across Central and West Africa for The Associated Press. title: Trump's administration has stopped releasing key immigration numbers | AP News
og:description: The Trump administration’s immigration crackdown is expanding, but the public data that tracks it is drying up.
og:title: As Trump pushes deportations, immigration data becomes harder to find
jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/trump-immigration-data-numbers-deportations-000a289890193c94474f19b877eb37d1","dateModified":"2026-03-15T12:14:09Z","datePublished":"2026-03-15T12:02:40Z","description":"The Trump administration’s immigration crackdown is expanding, but the public data that tracks it is drying up. Researchers and advocates say they can't hold the administration to account for one of its most contentious policies. The Department of Homeland Security has stopped or slowed updates on major dashboards and monthly reports. Those tools used to show arrests, detentions, removals and nationalities. The numbers that are available have come from lawsuits or are mandated by Congress. title: What's in the big bill that Trump has signed into law | AP News
og:description: President Donald Trump has signed his tax and spending bill into law after Republicans muscled it through Congress.
og:title: What's in the tax and spending bill that Trump has signed into law
jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/what-is-republican-trump-tax-bill-f65be44e1050431a601320197322551b","dateModified":"2025-07-05T02:44:24Z","datePublished":"2025-07-03T18:47:48Z","description":"President Donald Trump has signed his tax and spending bill into law after Republicans muscled it through Congress. At nearly 900 pages, the legislation is a sprawling collection of tax breaks, spending cuts and other Republican priorities, including new money for national defense and deportations. title: Trump lawyers meet with Justice Dept. officials as charging decision nears in Mar-a-Lago case | AP News
og:description: Lawyers for Donald Trump were meeting with Justice Department officials on Monday as a decision nears on whether to bring charges over the handling of classified documents at the former president’s Florida estate. The Trump lawyers two weeks ago requested a meeting with Attorney General Merrick Garland to raise concerns about what they alleged was prosecutorial misconduct and overreach by the team led by special counsel Jack Smith. But a defense attorney meeting with Justice Department officials is also often used as an opportunity to try to persuade them against bringing criminal charges.

title: Measuring the cost of extending Trump's tax cuts becomes a flashpoint in Congress | AP News
og:description: An obscure bookkeeping matter has become the latest flashpoint in Congress as Democrats accuse Republicans of violating Senate norms.
og:title: Measuring the cost of extending Trump's tax cuts becomes a flashpoint in Congress
jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/trump-tax-cuts-deficits-accounting-senate-b642681f7a4260dd8b25285199878d98","dateModified":"2025-04-03T04:02:48Z","datePublished":"2025-04-03T04:02:48Z","description":"An obscure bookkeeping matter has become the latest flashpoint in Congress as Democrats accuse Republicans of violating Senate norms. Senate Republicans are looking to change how extending President Donald Trump’s 2017 tax cuts would be scored when it comes to their impact on future deficits. The Congressional Budget Office has projected that extending the cuts would increase federal deficits by nearly $4 trillion over the next 10 years. Republicans are looking to draft their bill using a baseline that shows no impact on the deficit. Some of the most powerful forces in Washington are arguing for the accounting change. But fiscal watchdogs are sounding the alarm.","image":[{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"ImageObject","height":653,"thumbnailUrl":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/76a5c26/2147483647/strip/false/crop/5105x3404+0+0/resize/980x653!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.apnews.com%2F87%2Fff%2Fce77ce4816943bcdcf83f8d14bf2%2F88a335bfa1ab4058a97f08d87a007420","url":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/76a5c26/2147483647/strip/false/crop/5105x3404+0+0/resize/980x653!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.apnews.com%2F87%2Fff%2Fce77ce4816943bcdcf83f8d14bf2%2F88a335bfa1ab4058a97f08d87a007420","width":980}],"name":"Measuring the cost of extending Trump's tax cuts becomes a flashpoint in Congress | AP News","mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://apnews.com/article/trump-tax-cuts-deficits-accounting-senate-b642681f7a4260dd8b25285199878d98"},"author":[{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"Person","name":"Kevin Freking","url":"https://apnews.com/author/kevin-freking"}],"publisher":{"@type":"Organization","name":"AP News","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://assets.apnews.com/19/66/bc546486408c8595f01753a9fbeb/ap-logo-176-by-208.svg"}},"articleSection":["Politics"],"keywords":["Donald Trump","U.S. Republican Party","Charles Schumer","John Thune","Cory Booker","John Kennedy","Lindsey Graham","United States House of Representatives","U.S. Democratic Party","General news","Congress","Trump tax cuts deficits accounting Senate","Maya MacGuineas","Government budgets","Jodey Arrington","Government and politics","Washington news","Peter Peterson","Politics","Washington News"],"thumbnailUrl":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/76a5c26/2147483647/strip/false/crop/5105x3404+0+0/resize/980x653!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.apnews.com%2F87%2Fff%2Fce77ce4816943bcdcf83f8d14bf2%2F88a335bfa1ab4058a97f08d87a007420","headline":"Measuring the cost of extending Trump's tax cuts becomes a flashpoint in Congress"}]

jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/cameroon-president-biya-inauguration-09e4d8b9e722b1ef7309a8b978ed5d22","dateModified":"2025-11-06T15:08:03Z","datePublished":"2025-11-06T12:44:59Z","description":"Cameroon’s President Paul Biya has been sworn in for a new seven-year term after winning last month's presidential election. Biya, who at 92 is the world’s oldest leader, took the oath in Yaounde. Cameroon’s top court declared him the winner with 53.66% of the vote. There were protests after the election, leading to a three-day lockdown. The government confirmed at least five deaths, though opposition groups claim higher numbers. Biya has ruled since 1982 and if he completes this term, he will be nearly 100. title: Trump's DC arch includes golden-winged figure, eagles, lions and more | AP News
og:description: President Donald Trump’s plans for a new triumphal arch in the capital, unveiled Friday, include a towering winged figure with a Lady Liberty-like torch and crown, flanked by two eagles and guarded by four lions — all gilded.
og:title: Trump's Washington arch plan includes golden-winged figure, eagles, lions and 'One Nation Under God'

title: What to know about Somalia as Trump wants Somalis in the US to leave | AP News
og:description: U.S. President Donald Trump has called Somali immigrants living in the United States “garbage” and wants them to leave.
og:title: What to know about Somalia as Trump wants Somalis in the US to leave
jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/somalia-trump-immigration-explainer-f5155ea29c22441b6507e999b574e136","dateModified":"2025-12-04T08:05:07Z","datePublished":"2025-12-03T17:37:55Z","description":"U.S. President Donald Trump has called Somali immigrants living in the United States “garbage” and wants them to leave. Somalia is also one of the countries where the Trump administration this week paused all immigration applications. title: Hilton apologizes after Minnesota hotel refuses federal agents | AP News
og:description: A Minnesota hotel that wouldn’t allow federal immigration agents to stay there this month is apologizing and saying the refusal violated its own policies.
og:title: Hilton, Minnesota hotel apologize for email canceling immigration agents' rooms
jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/ice-immigration-hotel-hilton-minneapolis-minnesota-371da5e888d59c2bf66f53635aaa2acc","dateModified":"2026-01-05T23:43:05Z","datePublished":"2026-01-05T23:43:05Z","description":"A Minnesota hotel that wouldn’t allow federal immigration agents to stay there this month is apologizing and saying the refusal violated its own policies. The Department of Homeland Security had accused the global Hilton hotel chain of a “coordinated” effort to refuse service to its employees. DHS shared screenshots of an email from a Hilton address on Friday, stating immigration agents wouldn't be allowed at the Hampton Inn Lakeville, and their reservation was canceled. Though the hotel is under the Hilton brand, Hilton said the property is independently operated and quickly apologized. title: House GOP passes budget resolution, crucial step toward Trump's agenda | AP News
og:description: The vote is a crucial step toward delivering what Trump called his “big, beautiful bill,” with $4.5 trillion in tax breaks and $2 trillion in spending cuts.
og:title: House GOP pushes 'big' budget resolution to passage, a crucial step toward delivering Trump's agenda
jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/johnson-trump-republicans-budget-vote-tax-cuts-4cb74ca15f6a74a7344355e4507ab9fe","dateModified":"2025-02-26T03:35:47Z","datePublished":"2025-02-25T12:04:42Z","description":"House Republicans have muscled their budget blueprint to passage, with a push from President Donald Trump. The vote late Tuesday evening is a crucial step toward delivering what he's called his “big, beautiful bill,” with $4.5 trillion in tax breaks and $2 trillion in spending cuts. It kickstarts a weeks-long process to draft the details and merge it with the Senate's package. The vote was 217-215 with all Democrats opposed. But even some Republicans are uneasy. As Elon Musk is tearing through the federal government, Republicans are being hammered at town halls back home. It's a familiar GOP problem that slashing federal spending is easier said than done, as constituents rely on Medicaid and other programs and title: Extreme heat could impact the World Cup games. Here's what cities are doing to prepare | AP News
og:description: The 2022 World Cup tournament in Qatar was moved from summer to winter because of the threat of extreme heat.
og:title: This year's World Cup games could be sizzling. Here's what's being done to prepare for extreme heat
jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/world-cup-climate-change-extreme-heat-safety-soccer-481b018c2a0bc6fd3187ba6505402ee9","dateModified":"2026-04-29T13:13:08Z","datePublished":"2026-04-29T10:00:10Z","description":"The 2022 World Cup tournament in Qatar was moved from summer to winter because of the threat of extreme heat. But if the record-breaking heat that scorched the Southwest in March is any indication, summer temperatures in cities hosting World Cup games this year could be sizzling. In Los Angeles, officials are planning temporary pop-up hydration stations, shade structures and a public messaging campaign on how to stay safe in the heat. For the Dallas games and related events, plans include tents with misters, water distribution and multiple first aid stations, and medical personnel will have immediate access to ice immersion bags and ice. In Seattle, city officials are looking into providing air-conditioned buses, tents and water misters.","image":[{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"ImageObject","height":653,"thumbnailUrl":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/0a0fc57/2147483647/strip/false/crop/1568x1044+0+0/resize/980x653!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.apnews.com%2Fc9%2F88%2F5c7790bc7d7024b64d389b14ac67%2F443f53a8133547478fb8abf5d3e672bb","url":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/0a0fc57/2147483647/strip/false/crop/1568x1044+0+0/resize/980x653!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.apnews.com%2Fc9%2F88%2F5c7790bc7d7024b64d389b14ac67%2F443f53a8133547478fb8abf5d3e672bb","width":980}],"name":"Extreme heat could impact the World Cup games. title: Cameroon’s separatist conflict forces hundreds of thousands of students out of education | AP News
og:description: Fighting in Cameroon has made education come to a grinding halt for hundreds of thousands of students.
og:title: Cameroon’s separatist conflict forces hundreds of thousands of students out of education
jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/cameroon-education-separatist-conflict-language-4cee109cd90b1674107fbc77edb46a73","dateModified":"2024-10-20T04:01:18Z","datePublished":"2024-10-20T04:01:18Z","description":"Fighting in Cameroon has made education come to a grinding halt for hundreds of thousands of students. Cameroon has been plagued by fighting since English-speaking separatists launched a rebellion in 2017, with the stated goal of breaking away from the area dominated by the French-speaking majority. The Norwegian Refugee Council aid group says the separatist crisis in the west and incursions by the Boko Haram extremist group in the north have left 1.4 million school-age children in dire need of educational assistance as of 2023. The International Crisis Group says more than 6,000 people have been killed and more than 760,000 have been displaced. Separatists have attacked schools and kidnapped or killed teachers and students.","image":[{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"ImageObject","height":653,"thumbnailUrl":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/4f469ca/2147483647/strip/false/crop/3456x2304+0+0/resize/980x653!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.apnews.com%2F8a%2Ffb%2F69978c82e36207a3f160a7049b25%2F3382943c5ce545989f9c47504b0e8f91","url":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/4f469ca/2147483647/strip/false/crop/3456x2304+0+0/resize/980x653!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.apnews.com%2F8a%2Ffb%2F69978c82e36207a3f160a7049b25%2F3382943c5ce545989f9c47504b0e8f91","width":980}],"name":"Cameroon’s separatist conflict forces hundreds of thousands of students out of education | AP News","mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://apnews.com/article/cameroon-education-separatist-conflict-language-4cee109cd90b1674107fbc77edb46a73"},"author":[{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"Person","name":"Ngala Killian Chimtom","url":"https://apnews.com/author/ngala-killian-chimtom"}],"publisher":{"@type":"Organization","name":"AP News","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://assets.apnews.com/19/66/bc546486408c8595f01753a9fbeb/ap-logo-176-by-208.svg"}},"articleSection":["World News"],"keywords":["Cameroon","Schools","War and unrest","General news","Africa","AFRICA PULSE","Cameroon education separatist conflict language","Politics","World news","Boko Haram","Education","Children"],"thumbnailUrl":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/4f469ca/2147483647/strip/false/crop/3456x2304+0+0/resize/980x653!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.apnews.com%2F8a%2Ffb%2F69978c82e36207a3f160a7049b25%2F3382943c5ce545989f9c47504b0e8f91","headline":"Cameroon’s separatist conflict forces hundreds of thousands of students out of education"}]

og:title: Iraqi man charged with illegally voting in the 2020 election in New York
jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/iraqi-man-illegal-voting-doge-trump-c8b1d1c256c60a8ba5a56e7010251dd1","dateModified":"2025-04-29T21:02:08Z","datePublished":"2025-04-29T21:02:08Z","description":"An Iraqi man living in upstate New York has been charged with illegally voting in the 2020 election. Trump has blamed widespread voter fraud for his loss to Joe Biden in the 2020 election, despite analyses showing the claim was false. title: Nearly 40% of contracts canceled by Musk's DOGE are expected to produce no savings | AP News
og:description: Nearly 40% of the federal contracts that President Donald Trump’s administration claims to have canceled as part of its signature cost-cutting program aren’t expected to save the government any money, the administration’s data shows.
og:title: Nearly 40% of contracts canceled by Musk's DOGE are expected to produce no savings
jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/doge-federal-contracts-canceled-musk-trump-cuts-a65976a725412934ad686389889db0df","dateModified":"2025-02-25T17:34:38Z","datePublished":"2025-02-25T05:02:04Z","description":"Nearly 40% of the federal contracts that President Donald Trump’s administration claims to have canceled as part of its signature cost-cutting program aren’t expected to save the government any money, the administration’s data shows. The Department of Government Efficiency, run by Elon Musk, published an updated list Monday of nearly 2,300 contracts that agencies terminated in recent weeks across the federal government. Data published on DOGE’s “Wall of Receipts” shows that more than one-third of the contract cancellations, 794 in all, are expected to yield no savings. That’s usually because the total value of the contracts has already been fully obligated, which means the government is required to spend the funds for the goods or services it purchased.","image":[{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"ImageObject","height":653,"thumbnailUrl":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/9c73e57/2147483647/strip/false/crop/5652x3768+0+0/resize/980x653!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.apnews.com%2F8c%2Fe6%2F439a649c9a50ff9359fa4f6cecee%2F1eff1afab62b4509a42b13865bcff8a6","url":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/9c73e57/2147483647/strip/false/crop/5652x3768+0+0/resize/980x653!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.apnews.com%2F8c%2Fe6%2F439a649c9a50ff9359fa4f6cecee%2F1eff1afab62b4509a42b13865bcff8a6","width":980}],"name":"Nearly 40% of contracts canceled by Musk's DOGE are expected to produce no savings | AP News","mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://apnews.com/article/doge-federal-contracts-canceled-musk-trump-cuts-a65976a725412934ad686389889db0df"},"author":[{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"Person","description":"Foley covers national news for The Associated Press and is based in Iowa City, Iowa. title: Randy Moss, now cancer-free, chases his bass fishing passion | AP News
og:description: Randy Moss is still making big catches long after he finished playing football. The Hall of Fame wide receiver with the second-most touchdown receptions in NFL history has found his off-the-field calling fishing for freshwater bass.
og:title: Randy Moss is cancer-free and angling for the next big catch in pursuit of his bass fishing passion

The Hall of Fame wide receiver with the second-most touchdown receptions in NFL history has found his off-the-field calling fishing for freshwater bass. title: Scorching temperatures challenge players and courts at French Open | AP News
og:description: Paris is experiencing an intense heat wave during the French Open, affecting both players and the clay courts.
og:title: French Open groundskeepers drench the clay courts with water and salt during heat wave
jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/french-open-climate-water-heatwave-e12f6abb7c371ddddac80fb12208f9bd","dateModified":"2026-05-27T16:44:02Z","datePublished":"2026-05-27T16:44:02Z","description":"Paris is experiencing an intense heat wave during the French Open, affecting both players and the clay courts. Temperatures have soared above 30 degrees Celsius, which is unusual for late May. Head of court maintenance Philippe Vaillant says this weather is unprecedented. He and his team are working hard to maintain the courts by watering them more frequently and using calcium chloride to retain moisture. Heavy rains earlier in May helped prepare the courts for the heat. title: Separatists kidnap 79 pupils in Cameroon's restive northwest | AP News
og:description: YAOUNDE, Cameroon (AP) — Armed separatists kidnapped at least 79 students and three staff members from a Presbyterian school in a troubled English-speaking region of Cameroon, the governor said Monday.

title: Minneapolis' Somali community is stunned by White House refugee cap | AP News
og:description: In Minneapolis, where Somali refugees helped revitalize entire neighborhoods, the community was stunned by the presidential order capping annual refugee admissions at 7,500, the lowest number since the program began in 1980.
og:title: 'Where would America be without us?' A community of refugees is stunned by White House limits
jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/trump-immigration-somalia-refugee-5ebb043e13023188cdd4e6baebd1f42c","dateModified":"2025-11-01T02:14:01Z","datePublished":"2025-10-31T21:57:07Z","description":"In Minneapolis, where Somali refugees helped revitalize entire neighborhoods, the community was stunned by the presidential order capping annual refugee admissions at 7,500, the lowest number since the program began in 1980. Minnesota is home to the largest Somali community in the United States, roughly 87,000 people according to the latest census figures, most of whom live in the Minneapolis area. They have been coming to Minnesota, often as refugees, since the 1990s, drawn by generous social services and an ever-growing diaspora community. They have become increasingly prominent in the state. Somali-Americans have served on the Minneapolis and St. Paul city councils. They are in the state legislature. Democratic Rep. Ilhan Omar represents part of the state in the U.S. House.","image":[{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"ImageObject","height":653,"thumbnailUrl":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/36fd20c/2147483647/strip/false/crop/3718x2479+0+0/resize/980x653!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.apnews.com%2Fc0%2Fbb%2F2836ab0f9836c1505f06d338f468%2F4803e4b1d6d9463e8d2d4e81ebf25fa4","url":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/36fd20c/2147483647/strip/false/crop/3718x2479+0+0/resize/980x653!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.apnews.com%2Fc0%2Fbb%2F2836ab0f9836c1505f06d338f468%2F4803e4b1d6d9463e8d2d4e81ebf25fa4","width":980}],"name":"Minneapolis' Somali community is stunned by White House refugee cap | AP News","mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://apnews.com/article/trump-immigration-somalia-refugee-5ebb043e13023188cdd4e6baebd1f42c"},"author":[{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"Person","name":"Tim Sullivan","url":"https://apnews.com/author/tim-sullivan"}],"publisher":{"@type":"Organization","name":"AP News","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://assets.apnews.com/19/66/bc546486408c8595f01753a9fbeb/ap-logo-176-by-208.svg"}},"articleSection":["U.S. News"],"keywords":["Donald Trump","General news","Minneapolis","Minnesota","St. Paul","Immigration","MN State Wire","Trump immigration Somalia refugee","Race and ethnicity","Social services","U.S. news","United States House of Representatives","Politics","Murad Awawdeh","Race and Ethnicity"],"thumbnailUrl":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/36fd20c/2147483647/strip/false/crop/3718x2479+0+0/resize/980x653!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.apnews.com%2Fc0%2Fbb%2F2836ab0f9836c1505f06d338f468%2F4803e4b1d6d9463e8d2d4e81ebf25fa4","headline":"Minneapolis' Somali community is stunned by White House refugee cap"}]

title: Far too little vote fraud to tip election to Trump, AP finds | AP News

title: New book details McConnell's thoughts on Trump after 2020 election | AP News
og:description: Senate Republican leader Mitch McConnell said after the 2020 election that then-President Donald Trump was “stupid as well as being ill-tempered” and a “despicable human being."
og:title: McConnell called Trump 'stupid' and 'despicable' in private after the 2020 election, a new book says
jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/mcconnell-trump-biography-election-0a861001d95287e689336504abc2281f","dateModified":"2024-10-17T17:32:28Z","datePublished":"2024-10-17T09:00:11Z","description":"Senate Republican leader Mitch McConnell said after the 2020 election that then-President Donald Trump was “stupid as well as being ill-tempered” and a “despicable human being.\" That's according to a new biography of McConnell that'll be released this month. McConnell made the remarks in private as part of a series of personal oral histories that he made available to Michael Tackett, deputy Washington bureau chief of The Associated Press. title: Funcionarios federales y estatales ofrecen versiones encontradas de redadas migratorias en Minnesota | AP News

title: Zverev beats Mensik in French Open semifinals and will face Cobolli for elusive Grand Slam title | AP News
og:description: Alexander Zverev is within one victory of an elusive Grand Slam title. Zverev has reached the fourth major final of his career with a four-set victory over 20-year-old Czech Jakub Mensik in the French Open semifinals.
og:title: Zverev beats Mensik in French Open semifinals and will face Cobolli for elusive Grand Slam title
jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/french-open-zverev-7c5566181daf5ec1dc11d95ca1fdf232","dateModified":"2026-06-05T18:26:01Z","datePublished":"2026-06-05T15:45:30Z","description":"Alexander Zverev is within one victory of an elusive Grand Slam title. Zverev has reached the fourth major final of his career with a four-set victory over 20-year-old Czech Jakub Mensik in the French Open semifinals. In Sunday’s final Zverev will face 14th-ranked Flavio Cobolli. Cobolli advanced when 104th-ranked Matteo Arnaldi withdrew before their semifinal due to a virus. Zverev has been an overwhelming favorite for the title ever since the top-ranked Jannik Sinner struggled in the first week’s heat wave and wasted a two set and 5-1 lead against Juan Manuel Cerundolo in the second round. Two-time reigning champion Carlos Alcaraz withdrew before the tournament with an injured right title: Robert Trump, the president’s younger brother, dead at 71 | AP News
og:description: NEW YORK (AP) — President Donald Trump's younger brother, Robert Trump, a businessman known for an even keel that seemed almost incompatible with the family name, died Saturday night after being hospitalized in New York, the president said in a statement.

title: Trump administration welcomes 59 white South Africans as refugees | AP News
og:description: The Trump administration is welcoming a small group of white South Africans as refugees, saying they face discrimination and violence at home.
og:title: Trump administration welcomes 59 white South Africans as refugees
jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/south-africa-us-refugees-trump-afrikaners-16e34760b93cfa66f15b4cd8380743c1","dateModified":"2025-05-12T20:47:58Z","datePublished":"2025-05-12T18:05:28Z","description":"The Trump administration is welcoming a small group of white South Africans as refugees, saying they face discrimination and violence at home. title: Michigan Senate GOP probe: No systemic fraud in election | AP News
og:description: Michigan Senate Republicans who investigated the state's presidential election say there was no widespread or systemic fraud.
og:title: Michigan Senate GOP probe: No systemic fraud in election

title: Things to know about the gender-affirming care case as the Supreme Court prepares to weigh in | AP News
og:description: The Supreme Court is planning to weigh in on whether states can ban gender-affirming care for transgender minors.
og:title: Things to know about the gender-affirming care case as the Supreme Court prepares to weigh in
jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/transgender-genderaffirming-care-supreme-court-a04ab2f808175dbca1be6d90fe575611","dateModified":"2024-06-24T14:11:52Z","datePublished":"2024-06-24T14:07:48Z","description":"The Supreme Court is planning to weigh in on whether states can ban gender-affirming care for transgender minors. Most Republican-controlled states have adopted such laws in the past few years. The laws generally bar puberty-blocking drugs and hormone treatments for those whose gender identity does not match their sex at birth. Most major medical societies oppose the restrictions. The laws also prohibit gender-affirming surgeries for those under 18, though those are rare The laws are part of a broader effort that has resulted in reining in of the rights of transgender people. Meanwhile, many Democratic-controlled states have passed policies to preserve access to the treatments.","image":[{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"ImageObject","height":628,"thumbnailUrl":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/cebb487/2147483647/strip/false/crop/4430x2840+0+0/resize/980x628!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.apnews.com%2Fff%2Fcd%2F50ad2157a91a0c966f8ec779d54f%2F1789c2dd2ed84f2597c4fce74f0706c8","url":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/cebb487/2147483647/strip/false/crop/4430x2840+0+0/resize/980x628!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.apnews.com%2Fff%2Fcd%2F50ad2157a91a0c966f8ec779d54f%2F1789c2dd2ed84f2597c4fce74f0706c8","width":980}],"name":"Things to know about the gender-affirming care case as the Supreme Court prepares to weigh in | AP News","mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://apnews.com/article/transgender-genderaffirming-care-supreme-court-a04ab2f808175dbca1be6d90fe575611"},"author":[{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"Person","description":"Mulvihill covers topics on the agendas of state governments across the country. title: Jannik Sinner beats Alexander Zverev for 2nd straight Australian Open title | AP News
og:description: Jannik Sinner defeated Alexander Zverev 6-3, 7-6 (4), 6-3 to claim his second consecutive Australian Open championship.
og:title: Jannik Sinner beats Alexander Zverev in 3 sets for his second Australian Open title in a row
jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/australian-open-men-final-sinner-zverev-df0c51779000913e5c6a19725e085829","dateModified":"2025-01-26T14:27:13Z","datePublished":"2025-01-26T05:01:06Z","description":"Jannik Sinner has defeated Alexander Zverev 6-3, 7-6 (4), 6-3 to claim his second consecutive Australian Open championship. The victory in the final Sunday night by the 23-year-old Italian makes him the youngest man to leave Melbourne Park with the trophy two years in a row since Jim Courier in 1992-93. Sinner has won three of the past five major tournaments, including the 2024 U.S. Open, and rose to No. 1 in the ATP rankings last June. He’s also on a career-best 21-match winning streak. title: Pediatricians' group reaffirms support for gender-affirming care amid growing state restrictions | AP News
og:description: The American Academy of Pediatrics has reaffirmed its support for gender-affirming medical for children as the treatments face a growing push for bans and restrictions across the U.S.

jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/transgender-genderaffirming-care-pediatricians-176134f1b6ee1f2c146fef9a40cf351e","dateModified":"2023-08-03T22:39:31Z","datePublished":"2023-08-03T22:35:41Z","description":"The American Academy of Pediatrics has reaffirmed its support for gender-affirming medical for children as the treatments face a growing push for bans and restrictions across the U.S. The board for the group unanimously reaffirmed its 2018 position on the treatments. the board also voted to provide additional documents to support pediatricians, including clinical and technical reports, and to conduct an external systematic review about research on the care. title: Idaho can enforce ban on gender-affirming care, Supreme Court says | AP News
og:description: The Supreme Court is allowing Idaho to enforce its ban on gender-affirming care for transgender youth while lawsuits over the law proceed, reversing lower courts.
og:title: Supreme Court allows Idaho to enforce its ban on gender-affirming care for transgender youth
jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/supreme-court-transgender-health-idaho-f858bcce9a624ec79edc496414f2130f","dateModified":"2024-04-15T22:22:02Z","datePublished":"2024-04-15T21:14:20Z","description":"The Supreme Court is allowing Idaho to enforce its ban on gender-affirming care for transgender youth while lawsuits over the law proceed, reversing lower courts. The justices’ order Monday allows the state to put in place a 2023 law that subjects physicians to up to 10 years in prison if they provide hormones, puberty blockers or other gender-affirming care to people under age 18. Under the court’s order, the two transgender teens who sued to challenge the law still will be able to obtain care. The court’s three liberal justices would have kept the law on hold. A federal judge in Idaho had blocked the law in its entirety, saying that it was necessary to do so to protect the teens.","image":[{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"ImageObject","height":653,"thumbnailUrl":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/b1c68c3/2147483647/strip/false/crop/5679x3786+0+0/resize/980x653!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.apnews.com%2Fee%2F68%2Fcf4a2ce20b15a035eec50a5ebb36%2Fe45eeace5d4f43c888f03e4d28bd41e7","url":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/b1c68c3/2147483647/strip/false/crop/5679x3786+0+0/resize/980x653!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.apnews.com%2Fee%2F68%2Fcf4a2ce20b15a035eec50a5ebb36%2Fe45eeace5d4f43c888f03e4d28bd41e7","width":980}],"name":"Idaho can enforce ban on gender-affirming care, Supreme Court says | AP News","mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://apnews.com/article/supreme-court-transgender-health-idaho-f858bcce9a624ec79edc496414f2130f"},"publisher":{"@type":"Organization","name":"AP News","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://assets.apnews.com/19/66/bc546486408c8595f01753a9fbeb/ap-logo-176-by-208.svg"}},"articleSection":["Politics"],"keywords":["Gender","Idaho","Courts","General news","ID State Wire","supreme court transgender health idaho","U.S. news","Washington news","Ketanji Brown Jackson","Health","Government and politics","Supreme Court of the United States","U.S. News"],"thumbnailUrl":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/b1c68c3/2147483647/strip/false/crop/5679x3786+0+0/resize/980x653!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.apnews.com%2Fee%2F68%2Fcf4a2ce20b15a035eec50a5ebb36%2Fe45eeace5d4f43c888f03e4d28bd41e7","headline":"Idaho can enforce ban on gender-affirming care, Supreme Court says"}]

title: Spouses Monfils, Svitolina win back-to-back in Australia | AP News
og:description: Gael Monfils has joined Roger Federer as the only men to reach the Australian Open’s fourth round at age 38 or older since the tournament field expanded to 128 players in 1988.
og:title: Wife-and-husband duo Elina Svitolina and Gael Monfils win on the same court at the Australian Open
jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/gael-monfils-australian-open-taylor-fritz-37da4482d2c4f6818cdac72927f70420","dateModified":"2025-01-18T11:30:34Z","datePublished":"2025-01-18T06:58:48Z","description":"Gael Monfils has joined Roger Federer as the only men to reach the Australian Open’s fourth round at age 38 or older since the tournament field expanded to 128 players in 1988. Monfils came back to beat No. 4 seed Taylor Fritz 3-6, 7-5, 7-6 (1), 6-4 on Saturday. After punctuating his victory with a 134 mph (215 kph) ace — his 24th of the afternoon, doubling Fritz’s total — Monfils did a celebratory dance at the baseline while thousands of fans at Margaret Court Arena roared, many waving red-white-and-blue French flags. title: Sinner rallies from 2 sets down to beat Medvedev in Australia and clinch his first Grand Slam title | AP News
og:description: Jannik Sinner has rallied from two sets down to win the Australian Open final against Daniil Medvedev and clinch his first Grand Slam title.
og:title: Sinner rallies from 2 sets down to beat Medvedev in Australia and clinch his first Grand Slam title
jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/sinner-medvedev-australian-open-final-tennis-1abe8491238f6b9372278c2a1e74575c","dateModified":"2024-01-28T17:17:43Z","datePublished":"2024-01-28T12:38:58Z","description":"Jannik Sinner has rallied from two sets down to win the Australian Open final against Daniil Medvedev and clinch his first Grand Slam title. For 2021 U.S. Open champion Medvedev, the loss was his fifth in six major finals. The third-seeded Medvedev set a record with his fourth five-set match of the tournament and time on court at a major in the Open era. title: FRENCH OPEN '26: Coco Gauff has a new mindset for title defense and more confidence on her serve | AP News
og:description: Coco Gauff has a new approach for her second time around attempting to defend a Grand Slam title. The American’s strategy heading into the French Open that starts Sunday goes something like this: Don’t think about it as defending something.
og:title: FRENCH OPEN '26: Coco Gauff has a new mindset for title defense and more confidence on her serve
jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/french-open-coco-gauff-71247d03f5b8aac05495730ba313b939","dateModified":"2026-05-20T08:22:28Z","datePublished":"2026-05-20T08:22:28Z","description":"Coco Gauff has a new approach for her second time around attempting to defend a Grand Slam title. The American’s strategy heading into the French Open that starts Sunday goes something like this: Don’t think about it as defending something. Gauff says “I realize that the ‘defending’ means nothing in a way” and adds “I don’t really look at it as defending anymore.” Gauff’s first Grand Slam title defense at the U.S. Open two years ago ended in the fourth round with 19 double faults. She says “at the U.S. Open I was like, ‘I need to defend, defend.’\" And she adds “that’s why I just say now it’s just another tournament.\"","image":[{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"ImageObject","height":653,"thumbnailUrl":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/da1aaed/2147483647/strip/false/crop/4917x3278+0+0/resize/980x653!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.apnews.com%2Fab%2F5d%2F9dacebde4c6aace67b39c2531ccc%2F16a0701d39cd49ad9c6f7d7b612c68c0","url":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/da1aaed/2147483647/strip/false/crop/4917x3278+0+0/resize/980x653!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.apnews.com%2Fab%2F5d%2F9dacebde4c6aace67b39c2531ccc%2F16a0701d39cd49ad9c6f7d7b612c68c0","width":980}],"name":"FRENCH title: 'Moral compass': Requiem for South Africa's Archbishop Tutu | AP News
og:description: Anglican Archbishop Emeritus Desmond Tutu has been remembered at his funeral for his Nobel Peace Prize-earning role in ending South Africa’s apartheid regime of racial oppression and for championing the rights of LGBTQ people.
og:title: 'Moral compass': Requiem for South Africa's Archbishop Tutu
jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/africa-religion-cape-town-race-and-ethnicity-racial-injustice-dbff09f744f1c5c63e43b65617e8ed4a","dateModified":"2022-01-01T14:23:52Z","datePublished":"2022-01-01T14:23:52Z","description":"Anglican Archbishop Emeritus Desmond Tutu has been remembered at his funeral for his Nobel Peace Prize-earning role in ending South Africa’s apartheid regime of racial oppression and for championing the rights of LGBTQ people. Tutu died last Sunday at age 90. His plain pine coffin, the cheapest available at his request to avoid any ostentatious displays, was the center of Saturday's service. “Archbishop Desmond Tutu has been our moral compass and national conscience,” South African President Cyril Ramaphosa, who delivered the funeral eulogy, said. Ramaphosa handed a national flag to Tutu’s widow, Leah. The cathedral can hold 1,200 worshippers, but only 100 mourners were allowed to attend the funeral because of COVID-19 restrictions.","image":[{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"ImageObject","height":653,"thumbnailUrl":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/643f026/2147483647/strip/false/crop/3000x2000+0+0/resize/980x653!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fstorage.googleapis.com%2Fafs-prod%2Fmedia%2F0e8e8ad9d84b4e8ca7ab73f7f4845f88%2F3000.jpeg","url":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/643f026/2147483647/strip/false/crop/3000x2000+0+0/resize/980x653!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fstorage.googleapis.com%2Fafs-prod%2Fmedia%2F0e8e8ad9d84b4e8ca7ab73f7f4845f88%2F3000.jpeg","width":980}],"name":"'Moral compass': Requiem for South Africa's Archbishop Tutu | AP News","mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://apnews.com/article/africa-religion-cape-town-race-and-ethnicity-racial-injustice-dbff09f744f1c5c63e43b65617e8ed4a"},"author":[{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"Person","name":"Andrew Meldrum"}],"publisher":{"@type":"Organization","name":"AP News","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://assets.apnews.com/19/66/bc546486408c8595f01753a9fbeb/ap-logo-176-by-208.svg"}},"keywords":["Nobel Prizes","State funerals","Africa","AP Top News","Justin Welby","General news","Racial injustice","South Africa","Cape Town","Nelson Mandela","Desmond Tutu","Religion","Race and Ethnicity","World News"],"thumbnailUrl":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/643f026/2147483647/strip/false/crop/3000x2000+0+0/resize/980x653!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fstorage.googleapis.com%2Fafs-prod%2Fmedia%2F0e8e8ad9d84b4e8ca7ab73f7f4845f88%2F3000.jpeg","headline":"'Moral compass': Requiem for South Africa's Archbishop Tutu"}]

title: Federal judge blocks much of Indiana's ban on gender-affirming care for minors | AP News
og:description: A federal judge is blocking much of Indiana's ban on gender-affirming care for transgender minors from taking effect as scheduled July 1.
og:title: Federal judge blocks much of Indiana's ban on gender-affirming care for minors
jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/transgender-care-ban-indiana-lawsuit-3d9a3a456d7c0a06941f02e8998a6f56","dateModified":"2023-06-16T23:30:11Z","datePublished":"2023-06-16T21:05:59Z","description":"A federal judge is blocking much of Indiana's ban on gender-affirming care for transgender minors from taking effect as scheduled July 1. The American Civil Liberties Union of Indiana sought the temporary injunction in its legal challenge of the Republican-backed law, which was enacted this spring amid a national push by GOP-led legislatures to curb LGBTQ+ rights. Friday's order from U.S. District Court Judge James Patrick Hanlon will allow the law’s prohibition on gender-affirming surgeries to take effect. title: EXPLAINER: What medical treatments do transgender youth get? | AP News
og:description: Transgender medical treatment for children and teens is under attack in many states, but it has been available for more than a decade and is endorsed by major medical associations.
og:title: EXPLAINER: What medical treatments do transgender youth get?
jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/science-health-mental-ce8f5a9ee53768af03c3c65d5331045b","dateModified":"2022-04-21T14:00:43Z","datePublished":"2022-04-21T14:00:43Z","description":"Transgender medical treatment for children and teens is under attack in many states, but it has been available for more than a decade and is endorsed by major medical associations. It typically involves treatment with drugs that put a pause on puberty, followed by sex hormones, often not before age 16. These medications promote development of female and male sex characteristics. Guidelines say body-altering surgery should be reserved for those aged 18 and older, though chest operations are sometimes done before then. Research has shown that transgender youth and adults are prone to stress, depression and suicidal behavior when forced to live as the sex they were assigned at birth.","image":[{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"ImageObject","height":652,"thumbnailUrl":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/3dbc54f/2147483647/strip/false/crop/3000x1997+0+0/resize/980x652!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fstorage.googleapis.com%2Fafs-prod%2Fmedia%2F445cf5adeaff4b778d8ff666eb61edd4%2F3000.jpeg","url":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/3dbc54f/2147483647/strip/false/crop/3000x1997+0+0/resize/980x652!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fstorage.googleapis.com%2Fafs-prod%2Fmedia%2F445cf5adeaff4b778d8ff666eb61edd4%2F3000.jpeg","width":980}],"name":"EXPLAINER: What medical treatments do transgender youth get? | AP News","mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://apnews.com/article/science-health-mental-ce8f5a9ee53768af03c3c65d5331045b"},"author":[{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"Person","description":"national medical writer","email":"ltanner@ap.org","image":{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://assets.apnews.com/79/f3/10d4f6c14a80a48feab837d599e5/tanner-lindsey.jpg"},"jobTitle":"AP Medical Writer","name":"Lindsey Tanner","url":"https://apnews.com/author/lindsey-tanner"}],"publisher":{"@type":"Organization","name":"AP News","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://assets.apnews.com/19/66/bc546486408c8595f01753a9fbeb/ap-logo-176-by-208.svg"}},"keywords":["AP Top News","Mental health","Health","Science","U.S. News"],"thumbnailUrl":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/3dbc54f/2147483647/strip/false/crop/3000x1997+0+0/resize/980x652!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fstorage.googleapis.com%2Fafs-prod%2Fmedia%2F445cf5adeaff4b778d8ff666eb61edd4%2F3000.jpeg","headline":"EXPLAINER: What medical treatments do transgender youth get?"}]

title: Taylor Fritz's loss to Italy's Sinner in the US Open final extends Slam drought for American men | AP News
og:description: Taylor Fritz has come up short in his bid to win the first Grand Slam singles title for an American man in 21 years.
og:title: Taylor Fritz's loss to Italy's Sinner in the US Open final extends Slam drought for American men
jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/taylor-fritz-us-open-roddick-sinner-bd88b5b889a32111bfd736c24677d568","dateModified":"2024-09-08T22:48:34Z","datePublished":"2024-09-08T22:48:34Z","description":"Taylor Fritz has come up short in his bid to win the first Grand Slam singles title for an American man in 21 years. The 12th-seeded Fritz was outplayed Sunday in the U.S. Open final by No. 1 Jannik Sinner, who won 6-3, 6-4, 7-5. Fritz was the first U.S. man to appear in a major final since 2009 and the first to do so at Flushing Meadows since 2006. But the championship drought continues for the United States, which hasn't had a man win a Slam trophy since Andy Roddick at the 2003 U.S. Open. Fritz is a 26-year-old from California who had not made it past the quarterfinals at a major until now.","image":[{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"ImageObject","height":654,"thumbnailUrl":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/6999400/2147483647/strip/false/crop/1882x1255+0+0/resize/980x654!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.apnews.com%2Fdf%2F56%2F93e5c74ebf88d161059bee898d31%2F6a2f077903fd40d8b6a3c336072fdfbf","url":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/6999400/2147483647/strip/false/crop/1882x1255+0+0/resize/980x654!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.apnews.com%2Fdf%2F56%2F93e5c74ebf88d161059bee898d31%2F6a2f077903fd40d8b6a3c336072fdfbf","width":980}],"name":"Taylor Fritz's loss to Italy's Sinner in the US Open final extends Slam drought for American men | AP News","mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://apnews.com/article/taylor-fritz-us-open-roddick-sinner-bd88b5b889a32111bfd736c24677d568"},"author":[{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"Person","description":"Fendrich is an Associated Press national writer based in Washington, D.C. title: Argentina's Milei mirrors US health care cuts, eviscerating once-robust system | AP News
og:description: Cancer patients say they’ve grown sicker since Argentina’s radical libertarian President Javier Milei took his chainsaw to the public health system.
og:title: Argentines reel from health care cutbacks as President Milei's state overhaul mirrors Trump's
jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/argentina-milei-trump-rfk-health-care-cancer-8f5c4101140e1859c11ef4baed214054","dateModified":"2025-06-18T16:38:21Z","datePublished":"2025-06-18T04:39:28Z","description":"Cancer patients say they’ve grown sicker since Argentina’s radical libertarian President Javier Milei took his chainsaw to the public health system. Human rights groups have documented the deaths of over 60 people as a result of the dissolution of a federal agency, known as DADSE, that had covered their high-cost medication. That overhaul represents just one facet of how Milei’s cutbacks have torn at an extensive public health system that once set this country apart from the rest of Latin America. According to experts, government workers and advocates, the cutbacks have overwhelmed the nation’s vaunted, if creaking, public hospitals, upended vaccination efforts and taken a brutal toll on the country’s poor and unemployed.","image":[{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"ImageObject","height":653,"thumbnailUrl":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/c2d4090/2147483647/strip/false/crop/5762x3841+0+0/resize/980x653!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.apnews.com%2Fb4%2F30%2F762f9738849098560bdc914b9a35%2F447fa029a9e24bbb82defd4fd99a4c41","url":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/c2d4090/2147483647/strip/false/crop/5762x3841+0+0/resize/980x653!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.apnews.com%2Fb4%2F30%2F762f9738849098560bdc914b9a35%2F447fa029a9e24bbb82defd4fd99a4c41","width":980}],"name":"Argentina's Milei mirrors US health care cuts, eviscerating once-robust system | AP News","mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://apnews.com/article/argentina-milei-trump-rfk-health-care-cancer-8f5c4101140e1859c11ef4baed214054"},"author":[{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"Person","description":"DeBre writes about Argentina, Bolivia, Chile, Paraguay and Uruguay for The Associated Press, based in Buenos Aires.","email":"idebre@ap.org","image":{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://assets.apnews.com/7b/a1/fe7426c8482499fa7bdba48407b0/1c427b9d-a826-4aa4-9b1c-b5bb3641097b.jpg"},"jobTitle":"Senior reporter, Southern Cone","name":"Isabel DeBre","url":"https://apnews.com/author/isabel-debre"}],"publisher":{"@type":"Organization","name":"AP News","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://assets.apnews.com/19/66/bc546486408c8595f01753a9fbeb/ap-logo-176-by-208.svg"}},"articleSection":["World News"],"keywords":["Argentina","Health care costs","Meta Platforms, Inc.","Donald Trump","HIV and AIDS","Buenos Aires","Medication","South America","Robert F. title: US Open: Fritz beats Tiafoe in 5, faces Sinner in the final | AP News
og:description: Taylor Fritz has defeated a fading Frances Tiafoe 4-6, 7-5, 4-6, 6-4, 6-1 in an all-American matchup at the U.S. Open to reach his first Grand Slam final.
og:title: Taylor Fritz beats Frances Tiafoe to become the first American man in a US Open final since 2006
jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/us-open-9-6-2024-men-semifinals-sinner-draper-tiafoe-fritz-b142b422def1c9fae2a6e723d80302fe","dateModified":"2024-09-07T04:19:14Z","datePublished":"2024-09-06T22:22:59Z","description":"Taylor Fritz has defeated a fading Frances Tiafoe 4-6, 7-5, 4-6, 6-4, 6-1 in an all-American matchup at the U.S. Open to reach his first Grand Slam final. The 12th-seeded Fritz's victory Friday night earned him a showdown against No. 1 Jannik Sinner for the championship on Sunday. Sinner finished off a 7-5, 7-6 (3), 6-2 victory over Jack Draper earlier Friday to reach the final at Flushing Meadows for the first time. It's his second major title match of the year after taking the trophy at the Australian Open in January. Fritz will be the first U.S. man to appear in a major final since Andy Roddick lost to Roger Federer at Wimbledon in 2009. Roddick's 2003 U.S. Open title was the most recent at a major for an American man.","image":[{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"ImageObject","height":653,"thumbnailUrl":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/4e414c2/2147483647/strip/false/crop/5291x3528+0+0/resize/980x653!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.apnews.com%2Ff6%2F96%2F71388064b3c8519f5420188fbf7c%2F640e897ed00643cebe85fff509c87b66","url":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/4e414c2/2147483647/strip/false/crop/5291x3528+0+0/resize/980x653!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.apnews.com%2Ff6%2F96%2F71388064b3c8519f5420188fbf7c%2F640e897ed00643cebe85fff509c87b66","width":980}],"name":"US Open: Fritz beats Tiafoe in 5, faces Sinner in the final | AP News","mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://apnews.com/article/us-open-9-6-2024-men-semifinals-sinner-draper-tiafoe-fritz-b142b422def1c9fae2a6e723d80302fe"},"author":[{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"Person","description":"Fendrich is an Associated Press national writer based in Washington, D.C. title: US Open: Tiafoe, Fritz, Pegula, Navarro reach the semifinals | AP News
og:description: It's been 21 years since an American man won a Grand Slam title, but the country is guaranteed a male finalist at the U.S. Open this weekend.
og:title: US Open: Tiafoe, Fritz, Pegula and Navarro reach the semifinals and make US tennis matter again

jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/health-business-tennessee-nashville-vanderbilt-university-6deb93f7dea92f1b2082c39f72b59766","dateModified":"2022-10-08T00:48:20Z","datePublished":"2022-10-08T00:48:20Z","description":"Officials at Vanderbilt University Medical Center have announced that they are pausing gender affirming surgeries for minors in order to review their practices. On average, VUMC has provided five gender-affirming surgeries to minors every year since its transgender clinic opened in 2018. title: Four former Alabama State players paid to fix game in 2024, NCAA says | AP News
og:description: The hero of Alabama State’s first NCAA Tournament win and three of his teammates on the 2024-25 team have been ruled permanently ineligible for accepting payment from gamblers to fix the outcome of a game that season.
og:title: Four former Alabama State men's basketball players were paid to fix a game in 2024, NCAA says
jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/ncaa-gambling-alabama-state-2ba9e353aa22b7528338b1c6dd2a8d13","dateModified":"2026-06-05T17:43:04Z","datePublished":"2026-06-05T17:43:04Z","description":"The hero of Alabama State’s first NCAA Tournament win and three of his teammates on the 2024-25 team have been ruled permanently ineligible for accepting payment from gamblers to fix the outcome of a game that season. Amarr Knox, Shawn Fulcher, Corey Hines and Tony Madlock were alleged to have engaged in game manipulation when Alabama State played at Southern Mississippi in December 2024. Southern Miss was a six-point favorite and won 81-64. According to the NCAA, two known bettors offered the players a total of $2,000 to throw the game. The players accepted and were later paid.","image":[{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"ImageObject","height":700,"thumbnailUrl":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/6c4189c/2147483647/strip/false/crop/7589x5421+0+0/resize/980x700!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.apnews.com%2F2b%2Fd2%2Fc138b8c4702c666a509b2acb3f39%2F44c8d7ad4826479d8e435c80cd9edc54","url":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/6c4189c/2147483647/strip/false/crop/7589x5421+0+0/resize/980x700!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.apnews.com%2F2b%2Fd2%2Fc138b8c4702c666a509b2acb3f39%2F44c8d7ad4826479d8e435c80cd9edc54","width":980}],"name":"Four former Alabama State players paid to fix game in 2024, NCAA says | AP News","mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://apnews.com/article/ncaa-gambling-alabama-state-2ba9e353aa22b7528338b1c6dd2a8d13"},"publisher":{"@type":"Organization","name":"AP News","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://assets.apnews.com/19/66/bc546486408c8595f01753a9fbeb/ap-logo-176-by-208.svg"}},"articleSection":["Sports"],"keywords":["College sports","Men's college basketball","Corey Hines","Tony Madlock","Shawn Fulcher","Basketball","Mississippi","College basketball","Alabama","March Madness NCAA Tournament","Pennsylvania","NCAA Men's Bracket","PA State Wire","AL State Wire","ncaa gambling alabama state","Sports","Gambling"],"thumbnailUrl":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/6c4189c/2147483647/strip/false/crop/7589x5421+0+0/resize/980x700!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.apnews.com%2F2b%2Fd2%2Fc138b8c4702c666a509b2acb3f39%2F44c8d7ad4826479d8e435c80cd9edc54","headline":"Four former Alabama State players paid to fix game in 2024, NCAA says"}]

title: US Open: Jessica Pegula vs. Aryna Sabalenka in women's final | AP News
og:description: Jessica Pegula will take on Aryna Sabalenka in the U.S. Open women's final on Saturday. It is the sixth-seeded Pegula's first Grand Slam title match.
og:title: Jessica Pegula will meet Aryna Sabalenka in the US Open women's final Saturday
jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/us-open-2024-women-final-pegula-sabalenka-ef44a385134d173a6b5a5ae1ad6eb960","dateModified":"2024-09-06T17:28:19Z","datePublished":"2024-09-06T17:28:19Z","description":"Jessica Pegula will take on Aryna Sabalenka in the U.S. Open women's final on Saturday. Sabalenka also reached the final at Flushing Meadows last year before losing to Coco Gauff. Pegula is 30, making her the oldest American woman to reach her first Slam final in the Open era. Sabalenka is a 26-year-old from Belarus. Pegula has won 15 of her most recent 16 matches, all on hard courts. title: US Open: Novak Djokovic loses to Alexei Popyrin in third round | AP News
og:description: Defending champion Novak Djokovic has lost at the U.S. Open one night after Carlos Alcaraz did. Djokovic bowed out in the third round with a 6-4, 6-4, 2-6, 6-4 loss against 28th-seeded Alexei Popyrin of Australia on Friday night.
og:title: Defending champion Novak Djokovic is shocked at the US Open one night after Carlos Alcaraz's loss
jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/us-open-2024-novak-djokovic-popyrin-9c45dd85cf725b23c82e2ec825f741b3","dateModified":"2024-08-31T05:23:31Z","datePublished":"2024-08-31T03:50:42Z","description":"Defending champion Novak Djokovic has lost at the U.S. Open one night after Carlos Alcaraz did. Djokovic bowed out in the third round with a 6-4, 6-4, 2-6, 6-4 loss against 28th-seeded Alexei Popyrin of Australia on Friday night. The No. 2-seeded Djokovic was trying to become the first player in tennis history with 25 Grand Slam singles titles. Instead, he finishes a year without claiming at least one major championship for the first time since 2017. Before that, it hadn’t happened since 2010. The third-round exit equals Djokovic’s worst showing at Flushing Meadows. title: Coco Gauff wins the US Open for her first Grand Slam title at age 19 by defeating Aryna Sabalenka | AP News
og:description: Coco Gauff has won her first Grand Slam title at age 19 by coming back to defeat Aryna Sabalenka 2-6, 6-3, 6-2 in the U.S. Open final.
og:title: Coco Gauff wins the US Open for her first Grand Slam title at age 19 by defeating Aryna Sabalenka
jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/us-open-women-final-live-updates-2f95f716e0336551d27920bc32b3f9bb","dateModified":"2023-09-10T04:39:58Z","datePublished":"2023-09-09T10:00:07Z","description":"Coco Gauff has won her first Grand Slam title at age 19 by coming back to defeat Aryna Sabalenka 2-6, 6-3, 6-2 in the U.S. Open final. Gauff was spurred on Saturday by a raucous partisan crowd that was loud from start to finish. Gauff is the first American teenager to win the country’s major tennis tournament since Serena Williams in 1999. This is the sort of triumph that has been expected of Gauff ever since she burst onto the scene when she was 15 and became the youngest qualifier in Wimbledon history. title: Saudi Arabia will host the 2034 World Cup | AP News
og:description: Saudi Arabia has been officially confirmed by FIFA as host of the 2034 World Cup in men’s soccer, despite human rights concerns.
og:title: FIFA confirms Saudi Arabia as 2034 World Cup host despite human rights concerns
jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/fifa-world-cup-2030-2034-saudi-arabia-spain-portugal-945f8d7bf332553de0726901d096b956","dateModified":"2024-12-12T02:08:10Z","datePublished":"2024-12-11T10:55:37Z","description":"Saudi Arabia has been officially confirmed by FIFA as host of the 2034 World Cup in men’s soccer. The Saudi bid was the only candidate and was acclaimed by the applause of more than 200 FIFA member federations. They took part remotely in an online meeting hosted in Zurich on Wednesday by the soccer body’s president Gianni Infantino. The decision was combined with approving the only candidate to host the 2030 World Cup. Spain, Portugal and Morocco will co-host in a six-nation project, with Argentina, Paraguay and Uruguay each getting one of the 104 games. The South American connection will mark the centenary of Uruguay hosting the first World Cup in 1930.","image":[{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"ImageObject","height":653,"thumbnailUrl":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/527e1de/2147483647/strip/false/crop/2000x1333+0+0/resize/980x653!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.apnews.com%2F85%2F7c%2Fad71aeda7eae43765be98808e503%2F0ea41c2b93ed429f84ca191c98eb1a06","url":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/527e1de/2147483647/strip/false/crop/2000x1333+0+0/resize/980x653!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.apnews.com%2F85%2F7c%2Fad71aeda7eae43765be98808e503%2F0ea41c2b93ed429f84ca191c98eb1a06","width":980}],"name":"Saudi Arabia will host the 2034 World Cup | AP News","mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://apnews.com/article/fifa-world-cup-2030-2034-saudi-arabia-spain-portugal-945f8d7bf332553de0726901d096b956"},"author":[{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"Person","description":"Dunbar is an Associated Press sports news reporter in Geneva, Switzerland. title: NCAA bans 2 ex-Fordham players over point-shaving scheme | AP News
og:description: Two former Fordham basketball players have been permanently banned by the NCAA for their roles in a point-shaving scheme that was the subject of a sprawling federal indictment unsealed in January.
og:title: NCAA bans 2 former Fordham basketball players for their roles in point-shaving scheme
jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/ncaa-gambling-indictment-fordham-players-banned-3f89855996e85e0cb5faf73a05b943ab","dateModified":"2026-04-29T12:18:34Z","datePublished":"2026-04-28T23:24:59Z","description":"Two former Fordham basketball players have been permanently banned by the NCAA for their roles in a point-shaving scheme that was the subject of a sprawling federal indictment unsealed in January. According to the NCAA, Elijah Gray and Will Richardson each agreed with a bettor to throw a game against Duquesne on Feb. 23, 2024, in exchange for $10,000 to $15,000. Gray was one of more than two dozen people accused by federal prosecutors in Pennsylvania conspiring to fix games. He has agreed to plead guilty in that case. jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/sports-magda-linette-iga-swiatek-caroline-garcia-aryna-sabalenka-10ab2dc641a25cc01d0aafad648c8373","dateModified":"2023-01-23T12:32:38Z","datePublished":"2023-01-23T12:32:38Z","description":"The next stop on Ben Shelton's impressive debut run at the Australian Open will be the quarterfinals. Paul advanced by defeating 24th-seeded Roberto Bautista Agut in the fourth round. Also reaching the men's quarterfinals were Novak Djokovic and Andrey Rublev. jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/rafael-nadal-us-open-tennis-championships-sports-new-york-frances-tiafoe-ba1731ea16f65f61c85b77e015453c80","dateModified":"2022-09-08T21:54:26Z","datePublished":"2022-09-08T21:54:26Z","description":"Frances Tiafoe calls his run to the U.S. Open semifinals ‘a Cinderella story.’ He is a 24-year-old from Maryland who took up tennis because his father was a janitor at a junior training center, a player who never won a match past the fourth round at a Grand Slam tournament until now, who owns one career ATP title and a sub-.500 career record, and whose ranking ranged from 24 to 74 over the past two seasons. Tiafoe is the first man from the U.S. to reach the semifinals at Flushing Meadows in 16 years. og:description: Novak Djokovic came all the way back after dropping the first two sets to beat Stefanos Tsitsipas 6-7 (6), 2-6, 6-3, 6-2, 6-4 in the French Open final for his 19th Grand Slam title.
og:title: Djokovic claims 19th Slam with 5-set comeback at French Open
jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/europe-tennis-french-open-djokovic-comeback-tsitsipas-740f48e06b09d811787785a6be19e033","dateModified":"2021-06-13T20:14:02Z","datePublished":"2021-06-13T20:14:02Z","description":"Novak Djokovic came all the way back after dropping the first two sets to beat Stefanos Tsitsipas 6-7 (6), 2-6, 6-3, 6-2, 6-4 in the French Open final for his 19th Grand Slam title. title: Scott sharp again and Young and Torrens homer to help lift Mets over Padres 5-0 | AP News
og:description: Christian Scott threw 5 2/3 scoreless innings, Jared Young and Luis Torrens hit home runs and the New York Mets beat the San Diego Padres 5-0 for their sixth win in eight games.
og:title: Scott sharp again and Young and Torrens homer to help lift Mets over Padres 5-0
jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/mets-padres-score-c211784fdd98f2856c3ef24d797a83ea","dateModified":"2026-06-06T04:27:35Z","datePublished":"2026-06-06T04:23:06Z","description":"Christian Scott threw 5 2/3 scoreless innings, Jared Young and Luis Torrens hit home runs and the New York Mets beat the San Diego Padres 5-0 for their sixth win in eight games. Scott won his second straight outing and extended his franchise record by allowing four runs or less for the 17th consecutive start. He gave up three hits, struck out three and walked two. Huascar Brazobán, Luke Weaver and A.J. Minter got the final 10 outs without allowing a hit to send the Padres to their 10th loss in 11 games. title: Purdue's Smith moves within 1 of Hurley's assists record | AP News
og:description: Purdue guard Braden Smith is on the verge of breaking Duke great Bobby Hurley's all-time NCAA assist record.
og:title: Purdue's Braden Smith moves within 1 assist of Bobby Hurley's NCAA career record
jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/braden-smith-ncaa-assists-record-bobby-hurley-be39f03160666a6de4870db8eb196a43","dateModified":"2026-03-16T00:28:32Z","datePublished":"2026-03-16T00:28:32Z","description":"Purdue guard Braden Smith is on the verge of breaking Duke great Bobby Hurley's all-time NCAA assist record. Smith had 11 assists to move within one of Hurley's mark as No. 18 Purdue beat No. 3 Michigan 80-72 for the Big Ten Tournament title. He was also selected the tourney's Most Outstanding Player. Smith put himself in position to tie Hurley with a little over six minutes remaining. He passed to Trey Kaufman-Renn, who hit a floater to give the Boilermakers a 66-56 lead, but didn’t get another assist the rest of the way. Smith figures to break Hurley’s record when Purdue meets Queens in the NCAA Tournament in St. Louis on Friday. title: No. 1 Michigan uses strong interior game to beat up No. 7 Purdue 91-80 | AP News
og:description: Elliot Cadeau scored 14 of his 17 in the second half, and Aday Mara added 10 points and 11 rebounds to send No. 1 Michigan past No. 7 Purdue 91-80.
og:title: Elliot Cadeau scores 17 and No. 1 Michigan uses strong interior game to beat up No. 7 Purdue 91-80

title: Cluff leads No. 18 Purdue past UCLA to Big Ten title game | AP News
og:description: Oscar Cluff had 17 points and 14 rebounds, and No. 18 Purdue beat short-handed UCLA 73-66 to advance to the Big Ten championship game.
og:title: Cluff scores 17, comes up big down stretch as No. 18 Purdue beats UCLA to reach Big Ten title game
jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/ucla-purdue-score-236b9c42bbfb0902079ec7ad3ee4c5c5","dateModified":"2026-03-14T22:47:12Z","datePublished":"2026-03-14T22:03:44Z","description":"Oscar Cluff had 17 points and 14 rebounds, and No. 18 Purdue beat short-handed UCLA 73-66 to advance to the Big Ten championship game. Cluff scored eight points as Purdue outscored UCLA 11-4 over the final 3:41. Fletcher Loyer scored 14. Braden Smith contributed nine more assists, giving him 1,064 in his career. He needs 13 to break Bobby Hurley’s NCAA record of 1,076 for Duke from 1989-93. Trey Kaufman-Ren added 12 points and 10 rebounds, helping Purdue advance to the conference final for the first time since winning the tournament in Chicago in 2023. The Boilermakers will meet No. 3 Michigan. og:description: Chief Justice John Roberts is likely to play a modest role when he presides over the Senate impeachment trial of President Donald Trump.

jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/business-trials-us-supreme-court-impeachments-trump-impeachment-38e230d0d42dd5b313b7077c38db6a63","dateModified":"2020-01-16T19:53:15Z","datePublished":"2020-01-16T19:53:15Z","description":"Chief Justice John Roberts is likely to play a modest role when he presides over the Senate impeachment trial of President Donald Trump.
