title: García hits 1st grand slam for his 2nd HR of game in Nationals' 14-1 romp over Diamondbacks | AP News
og:description: Luis García Jr. hit his first career grand slam for his second homer of the game in the Washington Nationals’ 14-1 romp over the Arizona Diamondbacks on Friday night.
og:title: García hits 1st grand slam for his 2nd HR of game in Nationals' 14-1 romp over Diamondbacks
jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/nationals-diamondbacks-score-48a7d1c4ac980036b0eecd9cca05cf7b","dateModified":"2026-06-06T04:35:12Z","datePublished":"2026-06-06T04:35:12Z","description":"Luis García Jr. hit his first career grand slam for his second homer of the game in the Washington Nationals’ 14-1 romp over the Arizona Diamondbacks on Friday night. James Wood, Daylen Lile and C.J. Abrams also homered and Foster Griffin (7-2) allowed just two hits over five innings for Washington. The Nationals, who moved back to .500 at 32-32, immediately jumped on Merrill Kelly (5-4). Wood walked to start the game and García followed with a home run into the Nationals’ bullpen down the right-field line. García, who rarely faces a left-handed pitcher, stayed in against lefty reliever Philip Abner with the bases loaded in the sixth. He hit his seventh homer of the season to center field to make it 11-1.","image":[{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"ImageObject","height":653,"thumbnailUrl":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/c702100/2147483647/strip/false/crop/6352x4235+0+0/resize/980x653!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.apnews.com%2Fd6%2F7a%2F1c1fa197dfa2dc99cec31342b7cf%2F3a71cae96e7645099b5d451e15e35de2","url":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/c702100/2147483647/strip/false/crop/6352x4235+0+0/resize/980x653!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.apnews.com%2Fd6%2F7a%2F1c1fa197dfa2dc99cec31342b7cf%2F3a71cae96e7645099b5d451e15e35de2","width":980}],"name":"García hits 1st grand slam for his 2nd HR of game in Nationals' 14-1 romp over Diamondbacks | AP News","mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://apnews.com/article/nationals-diamondbacks-score-48a7d1c4ac980036b0eecd9cca05cf7b"},"author":[{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"Person","name":"Jack Thompson","url":"https://apnews.com/author/jack-thompson"}],"publisher":{"@type":"Organization","name":"AP News","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://assets.apnews.com/19/66/bc546486408c8595f01753a9fbeb/ap-logo-176-by-208.svg"}},"articleSection":["Sports"],"keywords":["Aramis Garcia","Luis Garcia","Foster Griffin","Baseball","Arizona Diamondbacks","James Wood","Washington Nationals","Merrill Kelly","CJ Abrams","Philip Abner","Ildemaro Vargas","MD State Wire","Maryland","Virginia","DC Wire","MLB","AZ State Wire","District of Columbia","Arizona","nationals diamondbacks score","MLB baseball","Sports","Max Muncy","Torey Lovullo","Adrian Del Castillo"],"thumbnailUrl":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/c702100/2147483647/strip/false/crop/6352x4235+0+0/resize/980x653!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.apnews.com%2Fd6%2F7a%2F1c1fa197dfa2dc99cec31342b7cf%2F3a71cae96e7645099b5d451e15e35de2","headline":"García hits 1st grand slam for his 2nd HR of game in Nationals' 14-1 romp over Diamondbacks"}]

title: Michigan set up to become No. 1 in AP Top 25 | AP News
og:description: Michigan is in a position to be No. 1 in the AP Top 25 men’s college basketball poll because the program had financial support to make moves in the transfer portal and coach Dusty May has developed a selfless culture that money can’t buy.

title: Injuries knock Brewers' Hall and Anderson out of loss to Giants | AP News
og:description: Milwaukee relievers DL Hall and Grant Anderson both left with injuries during the Brewers’ 12-9 loss to the San Francisco Giants.
og:title: Brewers relievers DL Hall and Grant Anderson leave with injuries during 12-9 loss to Giants
jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/hall-anderson-brewers-bd8d7c5afc6ea579f1febacefd664713","dateModified":"2026-06-04T22:29:07Z","datePublished":"2026-06-04T22:29:07Z","description":"Milwaukee relievers DL Hall and Grant Anderson both left with injuries during the Brewers’ 12-9 loss to the San Francisco Giants. Murphy said Anderson had bruised his forearm. A liner from Bryce Eldridge struck Anderson in the seventh inning of Thursday's game. Murphy didn’t have immediate word on the severity of either injury. title: Cincinnati firing men's basketball coach Wes Miller, AP sources say | AP News
og:description: Wes Miller will not be back as the University of Cincinnati’s men’s basketball coach, two people familiar with the move told The Associated Press.
og:title: Cincinnati firing men's basketball coach Wes Miller, AP sources say
jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/cincinnati-miller-fe2c1ec47e9b1ec56554051f25f2d945","dateModified":"2026-03-13T22:53:36Z","datePublished":"2026-03-13T22:53:36Z","description":"Wes Miller will not be back as the University of Cincinnati’s men’s basketball coach, two people familiar with the move told The Associated Press. They spoke on condition of anonymity because the university has not announced the move. Cincinnati is not expected to announce Miller’s firing until the two sides can negotiate an equitable buyout. Miller has three years remaining on his contract, but he’s owed $9.9 million if the firing happens before March 31. It drops to $4.69 million if the termination happens after April 1. Miller went 100-74 in five seasons, including 18-15 this year. Cincinnati has not reached the NCAA Tournament since 2019, which was Mick Cronin’s final season before he left for UCLA.","image":[{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"ImageObject","height":653,"thumbnailUrl":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/0cdf699/2147483647/strip/false/crop/2995x1997+0+0/resize/980x653!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.apnews.com%2F29%2F82%2Faa2587e59f5f022a6eb1fc682949%2F82dc173e0d904632a870ff520f9b3c05","url":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/0cdf699/2147483647/strip/false/crop/2995x1997+0+0/resize/980x653!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.apnews.com%2F29%2F82%2Faa2587e59f5f022a6eb1fc682949%2F82dc173e0d904632a870ff520f9b3c05","width":980}],"name":"Cincinnati firing men's basketball coach Wes Miller, AP sources say | AP News","mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://apnews.com/article/cincinnati-miller-fe2c1ec47e9b1ec56554051f25f2d945"},"author":[{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"Person","description":"Reedy is a sports writer based in Cleveland covering Ohio for The Associated Press. title: Dream season ends for FAU in 72-71 Final Four loss to Aztecs | AP News
og:description: FAU’s debut at the Final Four ended in the most excruciating manner imaginable. The Owls led for the last 27 minutes, 25 seconds of Saturday night’s game against San Diego State, only to watch their dream of a title become a nightmare when Lamont Butler’s jumper went through the net at the buzzer to give the Aztecs a 72-71 victory. The Owls made school history by getting here, only to walk off the court in shock as the Aztecs bounced around in celebration.
og:title: Dream season ends for FAU in 72-71 Final Four loss to Aztecs

title: Paul Westhead receives NBCA's Chuck Daly Lifetime Achievement Award | AP News
og:description: Paul Westhead won an NBA championship as coach of the Los Angeles Lakers in 1980. He won a WNBA championship as coach of the Phoenix Mercury in 2007.
og:title: Paul Westhead, champion coach in NBA and WNBA, receives NBCA's Chuck Daly Lifetime Achievement Award
jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/paul-westhead-chuck-daly-award-33f90c2a00364d5c1552821c5d9c2ed6","dateModified":"2026-06-05T18:19:17Z","datePublished":"2026-06-05T17:27:33Z","description":"Paul Westhead won an NBA championship as coach of the Los Angeles Lakers in 1980. He won a WNBA championship as coach of the Phoenix Mercury in 2007. And at the college level, his 1989-90 Loyola Marymount team that was led by Hank Gathers and Bo Kimble remains the highest-scoring squad in NCAA Division I history. Add it up, and that’s achievement. And the National Basketball Coaches Association celebrated his work on Friday, when it announced the 87-year-old Westhead as this year’s recipient of the Chuck Daly Lifetime Achievement title: Michigan snaps 5-game losing streak, beats Ohio State 73-65 in front of the Fab Five | AP News
og:description: Olivier Nkamhoua scored 20 points, Terrance Williams II added 18 points and Michigan beat Ohio State 73-65 in front of the Fab Five to snap a five-game losing streak.
og:title: Michigan snaps 5-game losing streak, beats Ohio State 73-65 in front of the Fab Five
jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/ohio-state-michigan-basketball-score-b2751c8297f98ed13232ee0f3bd53975","dateModified":"2024-01-15T19:47:40Z","datePublished":"2024-01-15T19:47:40Z","description":"Olivier Nkamhoua scored 20 points, Terrance Williams II added 18 points and Michigan beat Ohio State 73-65 in front of the Fab Five to snap a five-game losing streak. All five members of Michigan’s Fab Five attended a basketball game in Ann Arbor for the first time since they played there three-plus decades ago. Chris Webber, Jalen Rose, Ray Jackson and Jimmy King sat together courtside, while coach Juwan Howard led the Wolverines. Rose said they were there to support Howard as a person coming off heart surgery and as a coach in a challenging season. Michigan closed the game on a 13-4 run over the final four minutes. title: Naylor hits grand slam in 11th and Diamondbacks recover to beat Mariners 8-4 | AP News
og:description: Josh Naylor hit a game-ending grand slam in the 11th inning and the Arizona Diamondbacks beat the Seattle Mariners 8-4 after losing closer Justin Martinez with two outs in the ninth and then blowing a four-run lead.
og:title: Naylor hits grand slam in 11th and Diamondbacks recover to beat Mariners 8-4
jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/mariners-diamondbacks-score-naylor-martinez-0f37ddba04698576fb170cfecb582a77","dateModified":"2025-06-10T07:22:36Z","datePublished":"2025-06-10T06:18:23Z","description":"Josh Naylor hit a game-ending grand slam in the 11th inning and the Arizona Diamondbacks beat the Seattle Mariners 8-4 after losing closer Justin Martinez with two outs in the ninth and then blowing a four-run lead. Corbin Carroll launched a leadoff homer and Naylor had three hits and five RBIs for the Diamondbacks, who stopped a three-game skid. Martinez exited with right elbow tightness. Jeff Brigham replaced him and gave up RBI singles to Donovan Solano and Cole Young before Dominic Canzone tied it with a 450-foot drive to right field for his first major league homer this season. Juan Morillo retired slugger Cal Raleigh with two runners aboard to finally end the inning. Naylor homered off Carlos Vargas with one out in the 11th.","image":[{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"ImageObject","height":653,"thumbnailUrl":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/3f98b44/2147483647/strip/false/crop/5026x3351+0+0/resize/980x653!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.apnews.com%2F39%2Ff6%2Feaee7287df1ff6057e6f25b0d9f5%2Fe41c590939b94b1fa9cb2098279e8ead","url":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/3f98b44/2147483647/strip/false/crop/5026x3351+0+0/resize/980x653!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.apnews.com%2F39%2Ff6%2Feaee7287df1ff6057e6f25b0d9f5%2Fe41c590939b94b1fa9cb2098279e8ead","width":980}],"name":"Naylor hits grand slam in 11th and Diamondbacks recover to beat Mariners 8-4 | AP News","mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://apnews.com/article/mariners-diamondbacks-score-naylor-martinez-0f37ddba04698576fb170cfecb582a77"},"publisher":{"@type":"Organization","name":"AP News","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://assets.apnews.com/19/66/bc546486408c8595f01753a9fbeb/ap-logo-176-by-208.svg"}},"articleSection":["Sports"],"keywords":["Juan Morillo","Dominic Canzone","Justin Martinez","Arizona Diamondbacks","Seattle Mariners","WA State Wire","MLB","Arizona","Washington","AZ State Wire","mariners diamondbacks score naylor martinez","Sports","Carlos Vargas","Bryan Woo","Donovan Solano","MLB baseball","Ketel Marte","Jorge Polanco","Emerson Hancock","Josh Naylor","Jalen Beeks","Randy Arozarena","Merrill Kelly","Corbin Carroll","Geraldo Perdomo","Cal Raleigh","Dylan Moore","Jeff Brigham"],"thumbnailUrl":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/3f98b44/2147483647/strip/false/crop/5026x3351+0+0/resize/980x653!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.apnews.com%2F39%2Ff6%2Feaee7287df1ff6057e6f25b0d9f5%2Fe41c590939b94b1fa9cb2098279e8ead","headline":"Naylor hits grand slam in 11th and Diamondbacks recover to beat Mariners 8-4"}]

title: Arizona's Ildemaro Vargas sets record for Venezuela-born player with a 27-game hit streak | AP News

og:title: Cubs' Nico Hoerner departs win over Diamondbacks because of neck tightness
jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/cubs-hoerner-neck-8429bb3bd34cffd1ada9dea898b96beb","dateModified":"2026-05-01T22:22:57Z","datePublished":"2026-05-01T19:39:20Z","description":"Cubs second baseman Nico Hoerner is day to day after leaving the team's 6-5 victory over the Diamondbacks because of neck tightness. title: Hawkeyes-Vandy women's basketball game set for Sioux City, Iowa | AP News
og:description: Vanderbilt and Iowa will meet in a women's basketball game early next season in Sioux City, Iowa. The neutral-site game is set for Nov. 15 at the Tyson Events Center.
og:title: Hawkeyes are set to play Vanderbilt in a November women's basketball game in Sioux City, Iowa
jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/vanderbilt-iowa-womens-basketball-cef032e1e8aa8e20364e82d94d061121","dateModified":"2026-06-02T18:38:04Z","datePublished":"2026-06-02T18:38:04Z","description":"Vanderbilt and Iowa will meet in a women's basketball game early next season in Sioux City, Iowa. title: Jaden Bradley sends Arizona past Iowa State and into Big 12 final with buzzer-beating jumper | AP News
og:description: Arizona’s Jaden Bradley hit a fall-away jumper at the buzzer, sending second-ranked Arizona to an 82-80 victory over No. 7 Iowa State in the Big 12 Tournament semifinals Friday night.
og:title: No. 2 Arizona’s Jaden Bradley stuns No. 7 Iowa State with a buzzer-beater to reach Big 12 final

title: Diamondbacks reliever Justin Martinez exits with elbow tightness in 9th inning against Mariners | AP News
og:description: Arizona Diamondbacks reliever Justin Martinez has exited in the ninth inning against the Seattle Mariners because of tightness in his pitching elbow.
og:title: Diamondbacks reliever Justin Martinez exits with elbow tightness in 9th inning against Mariners
jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/arizona-diamondbacks-justin-martinez-885166c75a0c7716c3552dc09b5bc01a","dateModified":"2025-06-10T07:16:32Z","datePublished":"2025-06-10T05:12:38Z","description":"Arizona Diamondbacks reliever Justin Martinez has exited in the ninth inning against the Seattle Mariners because of tightness in his pitching elbow. Martinez entered to start the ninth with the Diamondbacks leading 4-0 and struck out Jorge Polanco and Randy Arozarena to begin the inning. The right-hander then walked Dylan Moore on a full count and called for an athletic trainer after throwing a pitch to Donovan Solano. Jeff Brigham replaced Martinez and gave up RBI singles to Solano and Cole Young before Dominic Canzone tied it with a 450-foot, two-run drive to right field for his first major league homer this season. Josh Naylor hit a game-ending grand slam in the 11th to give Arizona an 8-4 victory.","image":[{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"ImageObject","height":653,"thumbnailUrl":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/4053251/2147483647/strip/false/crop/6014x4009+0+0/resize/980x653!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.apnews.com%2F9a%2Ffe%2Ff70e522c6c57989aebe21d403dfd%2Fa0bed1f60e834609b0dd6e2f72a8315e","url":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/4053251/2147483647/strip/false/crop/6014x4009+0+0/resize/980x653!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.apnews.com%2F9a%2Ffe%2Ff70e522c6c57989aebe21d403dfd%2Fa0bed1f60e834609b0dd6e2f72a8315e","width":980}],"name":"Diamondbacks reliever Justin Martinez exits with elbow tightness in 9th inning against Mariners | AP News","mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://apnews.com/article/arizona-diamondbacks-justin-martinez-885166c75a0c7716c3552dc09b5bc01a"},"publisher":{"@type":"Organization","name":"AP News","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://assets.apnews.com/19/66/bc546486408c8595f01753a9fbeb/ap-logo-176-by-208.svg"}},"articleSection":["Sports"],"keywords":["Justin Martinez","Dominic Canzone","Arizona Diamondbacks","Seattle Mariners","Juan Morillo","WA State Wire","MLB","Arizona","Washington","AZ State Wire","arizona diamondbacks justin martinez","Sports","Jeff Brigham","Randy Arozarena","MLB baseball","Dylan Moore","Cal Raleigh","Donovan Solano","Jorge Polanco","Josh Naylor"],"thumbnailUrl":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/4053251/2147483647/strip/false/crop/6014x4009+0+0/resize/980x653!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.apnews.com%2F9a%2Ffe%2Ff70e522c6c57989aebe21d403dfd%2Fa0bed1f60e834609b0dd6e2f72a8315e","headline":"Diamondbacks reliever Justin Martinez exits with elbow tightness in 9th inning against Mariners"}]

title: Ildemaro Vargas fija récord de venezolano con racha de 27 juegos con hit para Diamondbacks | AP News

title: Nico Hoerner's $141 million, 6-year Cubs contract includes deferred money payable through 2047 | AP News
og:description: Nico Hoerner’s $141 million, six-year contract with the Chicago Cubs includes $10 million in deferred money payable from 2040-47.
og:title: Nico Hoerner's $141 million, 6-year Cubs contract includes deferred money payable through 2047
jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/nico-hoerner-cubs-contract-c0c43d3a38a5e3938ed240106dc9618a","dateModified":"2026-04-01T18:02:03Z","datePublished":"2026-04-01T18:02:03Z","description":"Nico Hoerner’s $141 million, six-year contract with the Chicago Cubs includes $10 million in deferred money payable from 2040-47. Hoerner has a $12 million salary in 2026, the final season of a $35 million, three-year contract agreed to in March 2023. His deal announced Sunday includes a $5 million signing bonus payable in equal installments on June 1 this year and in 2027. Hoerner gets salaries of $23 million each in 2027 and ’28, and $22.5 million annually from 2029-32. Chicago will defer $2.5 million a year from 2029-32, payable in $1.25 million installments each Dec. 31 from 2040-47.","image":[{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"ImageObject","height":653,"thumbnailUrl":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/a3d5f18/2147483647/strip/false/crop/6513x4342+0+0/resize/980x653!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.apnews.com%2F89%2F32%2Fdd5ac815b895da83f11cd1e9a9af%2Fbbccc2601e0b40848228463e28db03d6","url":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/a3d5f18/2147483647/strip/false/crop/6513x4342+0+0/resize/980x653!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.apnews.com%2F89%2F32%2Fdd5ac815b895da83f11cd1e9a9af%2Fbbccc2601e0b40848228463e28db03d6","width":980}],"name":"Nico Hoerner's $141 million, 6-year Cubs contract includes deferred money payable through 2047 | AP News","mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://apnews.com/article/nico-hoerner-cubs-contract-c0c43d3a38a5e3938ed240106dc9618a"},"author":[{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"Person","jobTitle":"AP Baseball Writer","name":"Ronald Blum","url":"https://apnews.com/author/ronald-blum"}],"publisher":{"@type":"Organization","name":"AP News","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://assets.apnews.com/19/66/bc546486408c8595f01753a9fbeb/ap-logo-176-by-208.svg"}},"articleSection":["Sports"],"keywords":["Nico Hoerner","Chicago Cubs","Baseball","Illinois","IL State Wire","MLB","nico hoerner cubs contract","MLB baseball","Sports","Pete Crow-Armstrong","Chicago"],"thumbnailUrl":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/a3d5f18/2147483647/strip/false/crop/6513x4342+0+0/resize/980x653!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.apnews.com%2F89%2F32%2Fdd5ac815b895da83f11cd1e9a9af%2Fbbccc2601e0b40848228463e28db03d6","headline":"Nico Hoerner's $141 million, 6-year Cubs contract includes deferred money payable through 2047"}]

title: Michigan wins program's 2nd national title, beating UConn 69-63 | AP News
og:description: High-scoring Michigan had to get down and dirty to dig out the national title, making only two 3-pointers all night but still muscling its way to a 69-63 victory over stingy, stubborn UConn.
og:title: Michigan muscles its way to program's 2nd national title, beating stubborn UConn 69-63
jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/michigan-uconn-ncaa-title-game-806339fe73ae4e8d62d69e24c85dcc79","dateModified":"2026-04-07T14:44:44Z","datePublished":"2026-04-06T15:14:41Z","description":"High-scoring Michigan had to get down and dirty to dig out the national title, making only two 3-pointers all night but still muscling its way to a 69-63 victory over stingy, stubborn UConn. Elliot Cadeau led the Wolverines with 19 points, including the team’s first 3, which came 7:04 into the second half. The second, from freshman Trey McKenney, came with 1:50 left and felt like a dagger, giving the Wolverines a nine-point lead. UConn fought to the finish in a game that had a 1950s feel. Alex Karaban scored 17 points for UConn, which was denied in its bid for a third title in four seasons.","image":[{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"ImageObject","height":653,"thumbnailUrl":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/2b9d4f1/2147483647/strip/false/crop/6000x4000+0+0/resize/980x653!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.apnews.com%2F85%2Fed%2Fe88b9961487b94ca9ae275ff9c9f%2Ff505ca8f0a4d465992a975c8a6033427","url":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/2b9d4f1/2147483647/strip/false/crop/6000x4000+0+0/resize/980x653!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.apnews.com%2F85%2Fed%2Fe88b9961487b94ca9ae275ff9c9f%2Ff505ca8f0a4d465992a975c8a6033427","width":980}],"name":"Michigan wins program's 2nd national title, beating UConn 69-63 | AP News","mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://apnews.com/article/michigan-uconn-ncaa-title-game-806339fe73ae4e8d62d69e24c85dcc79"},"author":[{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"Person","description":"As a national writer, Pells reports on the intersection of power, money and sports. title: UCLA adds 4 players through transfer portal | AP News
og:description: UCLA's basketball team has added four players through the transfer portal. Coach Mick Cronin says forwards Filip Jovic from Auburn and Sergej Macura from Mississippi State, along with guards Jaylen Petty from Texas Tech and Azavier Robinson from Butler, are joining the team.
og:title: UCLA's basketball team reloads with four transfers to bolster the Bruins

title: Crow-Armstrong, Cubs agree to $115 million, 6-year contract, AP source says | AP News
og:description: Pete Crow-Armstrong has agreed to a $115 million, six-year contract with the Chicago Cubs, establishing the All-Star center fielder as one of the franchise’s core players.

title: Cubs and 2B Nico Hoerner finalize their $141 million, 6-year deal | AP News
og:description: Nico Hoerner and the Chicago Cubs have finalized their $141 million, six-year contract that establishes the Gold Glove second baseman as a franchise cornerstone going forward.
og:title: Cubs and second baseman Nico Hoerner finalize their $141 million, 6-year contract
jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/cubs-nico-hoerner-9cc9d2f1f769f6796f2847a138d5a309","dateModified":"2026-03-30T00:01:26Z","datePublished":"2026-03-29T15:05:33Z","description":"Nico Hoerner and the Chicago Cubs have finalized their $141 million, six-year contract that establishes the Gold Glove second baseman as a franchise cornerstone going forward. title: Hidalgo has another strong performance, Notre Dame women beat Ohio State to move into Sweet 16 | AP News
og:description: Hannah Hidalgo put together another dominant performance with 26 points, 13 rebounds and eight steals as sixth-seeded Notre Dame advanced to the Sweet 16 for the 15th straight time with a 83-73 victory over third-seeded Ohio State in the second round of the women’s NCAA Tournament.
og:title: Hidalgo has another strong performance, Notre Dame women beat Ohio State to move into Sweet 16
jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/march-madness-notre-dame-ohio-st-score-hidalgo-cambridge-4b891e515ae6161bca0fcc261d9163ce","dateModified":"2026-03-23T23:45:24Z","datePublished":"2026-03-23T22:39:44Z","description":"Hannah Hidalgo put together another dominant performance with 26 points, 13 rebounds and eight steals as sixth-seeded Notre Dame advanced to the Sweet 16 for the 15th straight time with a 83-73 victory over third-seeded Ohio State in the second round of the women’s NCAA Tournament. title: UCLA storms past South Carolina to claim its 1st NCAA women's basketball title | AP News
og:description: Gabriela Jaquez scored 21 points, Lauren Betts added 16 and UCLA routed South Carolina 79-51 Sunday to win its first NCAA championship in women’s basketball.
og:title: UCLA storms past South Carolina to claim its 1st NCAA women's basketball title
jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/march-madness-ucla-south-carolina-score-1b7d7aa969d6bded7ad857fa1d760e32","dateModified":"2026-04-06T13:12:41Z","datePublished":"2026-04-05T14:49:39Z","description":"Gabriela Jaquez scored 21 points, Lauren Betts added 16 and UCLA routed South Carolina 79-51 Sunday to win its first NCAA championship in women’s basketball. The near-record lopsided victory completed the Bruins’ journey through this year’s March Madness that started following a loss to UConn in last season’s Final Four. The Bruins ran through their opponents this season with their only loss coming in November, to Texas in a Thanksgiving tournament. UCLA (37-1) was led by Betts and her fellow seniors and graduate students, like Jaquez _ who played all four years with the Bruins. She also had 10 rebounds and five assists in front of her brother Jaime, who plays for the Miami Heat and flew in to attend the game to watch his alma mater win.","image":[{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"ImageObject","height":653,"thumbnailUrl":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/56a0606/2147483647/strip/false/crop/8008x5339+0+0/resize/980x653!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.apnews.com%2Fdb%2Ff3%2Fce56fdf18b6117da25e6fb68f397%2Fb3f56ea3dba3490e95e290260c3cf3e2","url":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/56a0606/2147483647/strip/false/crop/8008x5339+0+0/resize/980x653!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.apnews.com%2Fdb%2Ff3%2Fce56fdf18b6117da25e6fb68f397%2Fb3f56ea3dba3490e95e290260c3cf3e2","width":980}],"name":"UCLA title: Mick Cronin wants college basketball to exceed so-called salary cap so schools can retain players | AP News
og:description: UCLA coach Mick Cronin warns the transfer portal is pushing college players to change schools too often and miss out on graduating.
og:title: Mick Cronin urges allowing schools to exceed the $20.5M revenue-sharing cap to retain players
jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/ucla-mick-cronin-984d72a3585c88ff19cbc76539f1d8ee","dateModified":"2026-03-04T07:36:41Z","datePublished":"2026-03-04T07:36:41Z","description":"UCLA coach Mick Cronin warns the transfer portal is pushing college players to change schools too often and miss out on graduating. The men’s Division I portal opens April 7 for a short 15-day window. Cronin says the churn often leaves players without a degree or a resume. He wants schools to be able to exceed the new revenue-sharing cap so they can retain their players. Otherwise, Cronin says, players are bouncing from school to school and not graduating. He says the money they make on name, image and likeness deals isn't enough to retire on. As a result, they're often looking for jobs in the real world when they're done playing basketball in college or overseas.","image":[{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"ImageObject","height":653,"thumbnailUrl":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/427b1fc/2147483647/strip/false/crop/7885x5257+0+0/resize/980x653!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.apnews.com%2F3b%2Ff8%2F64c341c584625de39c7415a423b8%2F7ec2bb3b6d7a43e2b12efe53a194195b","url":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/427b1fc/2147483647/strip/false/crop/7885x5257+0+0/resize/980x653!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.apnews.com%2F3b%2Ff8%2F64c341c584625de39c7415a423b8%2F7ec2bb3b6d7a43e2b12efe53a194195b","width":980}],"name":"Mick Cronin wants college basketball to exceed so-called salary cap so schools can retain players | AP News","mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://apnews.com/article/ucla-mick-cronin-984d72a3585c88ff19cbc76539f1d8ee"},"author":[{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"Person","jobTitle":"AP Sports Writer","name":"Beth Harris","url":"https://apnews.com/author/beth-harris"}],"publisher":{"@type":"Organization","name":"AP News","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://assets.apnews.com/19/66/bc546486408c8595f01753a9fbeb/ap-logo-176-by-208.svg"}},"articleSection":["Sports"],"keywords":["Mick Cronin","College sports","Schools","College basketball","Men's college basketball","UCLA Bruins","Sports transactions","Basketball","California","ucla mick cronin","Compensation in sports","Boise","Donovan Dent","Michigan","Johnny Juzang","Sports","Nebraska","Chad Baker-Mazara","Dylan Andrews","Sports retirements"],"thumbnailUrl":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/427b1fc/2147483647/strip/false/crop/7885x5257+0+0/resize/980x653!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.apnews.com%2F3b%2Ff8%2F64c341c584625de39c7415a423b8%2F7ec2bb3b6d7a43e2b12efe53a194195b","headline":"Mick Cronin wants college basketball to exceed so-called salary cap so schools can retain players"}]

title: Nationals beat Cubs 10-4 on opening day for manager Blake Butera’s first win with the team | AP News
og:description: Brady House, Joey Wiemer and Jacob Young homered for Washington on opening day, and the Nationals beat Alex Bregman and the Chicago Cubs 10-4 for manager Blake Butera’s first win with the team.
og:title: Nationals beat Cubs 10-4 on opening day for manager Blake Butera’s first win with the team
jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/nationals-cubs-score-736894f1a18fe9f9bd6dfc500ed96f4a","dateModified":"2026-03-27T01:18:58Z","datePublished":"2026-03-26T21:27:54Z","description":"Brady House, Joey Wiemer and Jacob Young homered for Washington on opening day, and the Nationals beat Alex Bregman and the Chicago Cubs 10-4 for manager Blake Butera’s first win with the team. CJ Abrams hit a tiebreaking two-run single during Washington’s six-run fourth inning on a blustery afternoon at Wrigley Field. Butera is part of a new leadership group for the rebuilding Nationals after they went 66-96 last year in their sixth straight losing season. Paul Toboni took over as the team’s president of baseball operations on Oct. 1, and he hired the 33-year-old Butera out of Tampa Bay’s front office. title: Chad Baker-Mazara exits Southern California's basketball program | AP News
og:description: USC says Chad Baker-Mazara is no longer part of its men’s basketball program. The team released a short statement that provided no explanation.
og:title: USC 2nd-leading scorer Chad Baker-Mazara abruptly out of the program with no explanation
jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/baker-mazara-usc-3059d963f8ec9a28beb201c29c9cb166","dateModified":"2026-03-02T00:03:32Z","datePublished":"2026-03-01T23:39:01Z","description":"USC says Chad Baker-Mazara is no longer part of its men’s basketball program. title: Mikayla Blakes sets Vanderbilt women's single-season scoring record in NCAA opener | AP News
og:description: All-American Mikayla Blakes needed only part of the first half Saturday night of the NCAA Tournament to become the best single-season scorer in Vanderbilt women’s history.
og:title: Mikayla Blakes storms past Vanderbilt women's single-season scoring mark in NCAA opener
jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/march-madness-vanderbilt-mikayla-blakes-222825636f130a53e03308d72678bbb1","dateModified":"2026-03-22T02:27:42Z","datePublished":"2026-03-22T00:07:35Z","description":"All-American Mikayla Blakes needed only part of the first half Saturday night of the NCAA Tournament to become the best single-season scorer in Vanderbilt women’s history. The nation’s scoring leader had 23 by halftime against No. 15 seed High Point just four off her average of 27 a game. That helped the second-seeded Commodores lead 54-32 at halftime. title: Chad Baker-Mazara hits 5 3s, scores 29; USC beats Wisconsin 73-71 | AP News
og:description: Chad Baker-Mazara made five 3-pointers and scored 29 points, Ezra Ausar added 17 points, and USC beat Wisconsin 73-71 to snap the Badgers’ five-game win streak.
og:title: Chad Baker-Mazara hits 5 3s, scores 29; USC beats Wisconsin 73-71
jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/usc-wisconsin-score-06c02ff45751f4bd101928a9918b18df","dateModified":"2026-01-25T23:20:04Z","datePublished":"2026-01-25T23:20:04Z","description":"Chad Baker-Mazara made five 3-pointers and scored 29 points, Ezra Ausar added 17 points, and USC beat Wisconsin 73-71 to snap the Badgers’ five-game win streak. Jacob Cofie had 11 rebounds to go with nine points and five assists for USC. Nick Boyd hit a 3-pointer, made two free throws and added a layup to spark a 17-2 run that gave the Badgers a 58-46 lead with 12 minutes to play, but the Badgers made just 4 of 16 from the field the rest of the way. Baker-Mazara scored nine points — which included the final seven — in a 16-2 run over the next seven-plus minutes to take a two-point lead with 4:54 remaining. title: Bam Adebayo's 83 celebrated by some, criticized by others | AP News
og:description: Bam Adebayo's 83-point game for the Miami Heat has stirred up a ton of emotions around the NBA. Some players lauded it. Some around the league criticized it.
og:title: Bam Adebayo's 83-point night was one to remember in Miami. But not everyone was pleased

title: Dodgers unveil tribute to LGBTQ+ trailblazers Glenn Burke and Billy Bean | AP News
og:description: The Los Angeles Dodgers have unveiled a permanent display honoring LGBTQ+ trailblazers and former players for the team Glenn Burke and Billy Bean, who were the first two major leaguers to say they were gay.
og:title: Dodgers honor gay trailblazers Glenn Burke and Billy Bean with permanent stadium display
jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/dodgers-billy-bean-glenn-burke-5a9cfbfcfbbc15d39dfab994d058f96d","dateModified":"2026-06-06T00:49:32Z","datePublished":"2026-06-06T00:49:32Z","description":"The Los Angeles Dodgers have unveiled a permanent display honoring LGBTQ+ trailblazers and former players for the team Glenn Burke and Billy Bean, who were the first two major leaguers to say they were gay. A brief ceremony with their families was held on the team’s 13th Pride Night, hours before the Dodgers hosted the Los Angeles Angels in the Freeway Series. Burke was the first MLB player to come out as gay, announcing it in 1982 after he retired. He died in 1995. Four years later, Bean became the second MLB player to reveal that he was gay. He died in 2024.","image":[{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"ImageObject","height":653,"thumbnailUrl":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/5e26cd1/2147483647/strip/false/crop/6000x4000+0+0/resize/980x653!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.apnews.com%2F8a%2Fc7%2F196bfe3bc9a0554cbabdb6f36588%2F3c0e5deedbc34ab2a07ed6e6256e802b","url":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/5e26cd1/2147483647/strip/false/crop/6000x4000+0+0/resize/980x653!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.apnews.com%2F8a%2Fc7%2F196bfe3bc9a0554cbabdb6f36588%2F3c0e5deedbc34ab2a07ed6e6256e802b","width":980}],"name":"Dodgers unveil tribute to LGBTQ+ trailblazers Glenn Burke and Billy Bean | AP News","mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://apnews.com/article/dodgers-billy-bean-glenn-burke-5a9cfbfcfbbc15d39dfab994d058f96d"},"author":[{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"Person","jobTitle":"AP Sports Writer","name":"Beth Harris","url":"https://apnews.com/author/beth-harris"}],"publisher":{"@type":"Organization","name":"AP News","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://assets.apnews.com/19/66/bc546486408c8595f01753a9fbeb/ap-logo-176-by-208.svg"}},"articleSection":["Sports"],"keywords":["Billy Bean","Glenn Burke","Dusty Baker","Los Angeles Dodgers","LGBTQ+","Baseball","Los Angeles Angels","New Jersey","New York City","MLB","California","New York","dodgers billy bean glenn burke","Linda Kovac","Greg Baker","Joyce Burke Henderson","Sports","MLB baseball"],"thumbnailUrl":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/5e26cd1/2147483647/strip/false/crop/6000x4000+0+0/resize/980x653!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.apnews.com%2F8a%2Fc7%2F196bfe3bc9a0554cbabdb6f36588%2F3c0e5deedbc34ab2a07ed6e6256e802b","headline":"Dodgers unveil tribute to LGBTQ+ trailblazers Glenn Burke and Billy Bean"}]

og:description: The United States wasted little time showing how potent its roster could be at the upcoming World Baseball Classic.

title: Yankees' Aaron Judge to be US captain at 2026 World Baseball Classic | AP News
og:description: Aaron Judge will be the U.S. captain at next year’s World Baseball Classic, the same role the two-time American League Most Valuable Player fills with the New York Yankees.
og:title: Yankees' Aaron Judge to be US captain at 2026 World Baseball Classic
jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/judge-captain-us-wbc-ffb327da780472c99043c7e80c50c986","dateModified":"2025-04-14T22:09:46Z","datePublished":"2025-04-14T17:11:05Z","description":"Aaron Judge will be the U.S. captain at next year’s World Baseball Classic, the same role the two-time American League Most Valuable Player fills with the New York Yankees. Mark DeRosa made the announcement four days after he was appointed U.S. manager for the second straight WBC. Judge takes over from the Los Angeles Angels’ Mike Trout, who was captain at the 2023 tournament. The U.S. lost the 2023 championship game to Japan 3-2 as Shohei Ohtani struck out Trout, his then-Angels teammate, to end the game. title: Bam Adebayo scores 83 points, 2nd-best scoring night in NBA history | AP News
og:description: It’s Wilt, then Bam. Bam Adebayo had a night for all time on Tuesday, with a point total second to only Wilt Chamberlain in the NBA record books.
og:title: Bam! Heat's Adebayo scores 83 points, 2nd only to Wilt Chamberlain in NBA history
jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/bam-adebayo-heat-scoring-f867bb9f002c075d25e5fb3fc718d6db","dateModified":"2026-03-11T04:04:48Z","datePublished":"2026-03-11T00:37:16Z","description":"It’s Wilt, then Bam. Bam Adebayo had a night for all time on Tuesday, with a point total second to only Wilt Chamberlain in the NBA record books. Adebayo scored 83 points, setting league marks for free throws made and attempted in a game for the Miami Heat in a 150-129 win over the Washington Wizards. Adebayo started with a 31-point first quarter — and never stopped rolling. He was up to 43 at halftime, 62 by the end of the third quarter. And then came the fourth, when the milestones kept falling despite facing double-, triple- and what once appeared to be a quadruple-team from a Wizards defense that kept sending him to the foul title: Billy Bean, second openly gay ex-MLB player, dies at 60 | AP News
og:description: Billy Bean, who became the second former Major League Baseball player to come out as gay in 1999 before becoming the sport’s senior vice president for diversity, equity and inclusion, has died.
og:title: Billy Bean, second openly gay ex-MLB player who later worked in commissioner's office, dies at 60
jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/billy-bean-mlb-obit-5064b1ab0d5e0879ce24a7ba4f9d0264","dateModified":"2024-08-06T22:45:25Z","datePublished":"2024-08-06T22:08:34Z","description":"Billy Bean, who became the second former Major League Baseball player to come out as gay in 1999 before becoming the sport’s senior vice president for diversity, equity and inclusion, has died. He was 60. MLB released a statement confirming his death. Bean died at home Tuesday after a yearlong fight with acute myeloid leukemia. The California native played in six big league seasons from 1987 to 1995, making his debut with the Detroit Tigers in a four-hit performance that tied a record for a player in his first game. He publicly came out as gay in 1999, the second former major leaguer to do so after Glenn Burke.","image":[{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"ImageObject","height":684,"thumbnailUrl":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/c928a0b/2147483647/strip/false/crop/3540x2471+0+0/resize/980x684!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.apnews.com%2F4a%2F63%2F98598f42d2e18e9ca4a68fc8c728%2F2732807e5992453d8a13ba606f217cc5","url":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/c928a0b/2147483647/strip/false/crop/3540x2471+0+0/resize/980x684!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.apnews.com%2F4a%2F63%2F98598f42d2e18e9ca4a68fc8c728%2F2732807e5992453d8a13ba606f217cc5","width":980}],"name":"Billy Bean, second openly gay ex-MLB player, dies at 60 | AP News","mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://apnews.com/article/billy-bean-mlb-obit-5064b1ab0d5e0879ce24a7ba4f9d0264"},"publisher":{"@type":"Organization","name":"AP News","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://assets.apnews.com/19/66/bc546486408c8595f01753a9fbeb/ap-logo-176-by-208.svg"}},"articleSection":["Sports"],"keywords":["Baseball","Detroit Tigers","MLB","New York City Wire","Notable Deaths","MI State Wire","CA State Wire","Trending News","billy bean mlb obit","MLB baseball","Race and ethnicity","Sports","Race and Ethnicity"],"thumbnailUrl":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/c928a0b/2147483647/strip/false/crop/3540x2471+0+0/resize/980x684!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.apnews.com%2F4a%2F63%2F98598f42d2e18e9ca4a68fc8c728%2F2732807e5992453d8a13ba606f217cc5","headline":"Billy Bean, second openly gay ex-MLB player, dies at 60"}]

title: Devin Booker hurts ankle after tripping over Dort's foot | AP News
og:description: Devin Booker briefly left the Phoenix Suns’ Game 3 loss to the Oklahoma City Thunder on Saturday because of a left ankle injury he sustained after tripping over Lu Dort’s foot.
og:title: Suns' Booker hurts ankle after tripping over Dort's foot, says he doesn't know if it was on purpose
jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/suns-booker-ankle-injury-30cf73749eb78f504f621b1035006304","dateModified":"2026-04-26T03:14:19Z","datePublished":"2026-04-25T23:38:51Z","description":"Devin Booker briefly left the Phoenix Suns’ Game 3 loss to the Oklahoma City Thunder on Saturday because of a left ankle injury he sustained after tripping over Lu Dort’s foot. The injury occurred early in the third quarter when Booker — a five-time All-Star — was driving to the basket and tripped over Dort's right foot. title: Bam Adebayo scores 83, 2nd-best scoring game in NBA history | AP News
og:description: Bam Adebayo scored 83 points, the second-best scoring effort in league history to carry the Miami Heat to a 150-129 win over the Washington Wizards on Tuesday night.
og:title: Bam Adebayo scores 83 points, 2nd-best in NBA history, sets FT records in Heat win over Wizards
jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/wizards-heat-score-bam-adebayo-7ecf861fe78484688e0990bc7d2da1b9","dateModified":"2026-03-11T02:18:07Z","datePublished":"2026-03-11T02:18:07Z","description":"Bam Adebayo scored 83 points, the second-best scoring effort in league history to carry the Miami Heat to a 150-129 win over the Washington Wizards on Tuesday night. Adebayo had 31 points in the first quarter, 43 by halftime and 62 by the end of the third quarter. He finished 20 for 43 from the field, 36 for 43 from the foul line and 7 for 22 from 3-point range. Adebayo’s free throw makes and attempts both set NBA records for a game. The record for attempts was 39 by Dwight Howard — who got to the line that many times on two occasions. The record for free throws made in a game was 28, set by Wilt Chamberlain and Adrian title: Lakers hire Rohan Ramadas as assistant GM in latest move to bolster their front office | AP News
og:description: The Los Angeles Lakers have hired Rohan Ramadas as their assistant general manager of strategy and data systems.
og:title: Lakers hire Pelicans exec Rohan Ramadas as assistant GM in latest move to bolster their front office
jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/lakers-rohan-ramadas-704f12f61e558388f53b2301579e851a","dateModified":"2026-05-26T20:26:46Z","datePublished":"2026-05-26T20:26:46Z","description":"The Los Angeles Lakers have hired Rohan Ramadas as their assistant general manager of strategy and data systems. It's the first major move of their offseason toward their goal to bolster their front office under new ownership. Ramadas spent the past nine years working with the New Orleans Pelicans, including the past two as their vice president of strategy and basketball operations. He will be in charge of basketball analytics and strategic initiatives for basketball operations with the Lakers. title: Alvarez blasts Baker, Astros to World Series title vs Phils | AP News
og:description: Yordan Alvarez hit a towering three-run homer and the Houston Astros clinched their second World Series title in six seasons with a 4-1 win over the Philadelphia Phillies in Game 6.
og:title: Alvarez blasts Baker, Astros to World Series title vs Phils
jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/houston-astros-world-series-champions-phillies-af94071eece8c17cb91322a0bd398cd9","dateModified":"2022-11-06T06:26:57Z","datePublished":"2022-11-06T06:26:57Z","description":"Yordan Alvarez hit a towering three-run homer and the Houston Astros clinched their second World Series title in six seasons with a 4-1 win over the Philadelphia Phillies in Game 6. That also gave 73-year-old manager Dusty Baker his first title in 25 seasons as a manager, the last three in Houston. This was Houston's second championship. The Astros also won in 2017, a title tarnished by their sign-stealing scandal. Alvarez's home run in the sixth inning put Houston ahead 3-1. Astros rookie shortstop Jeremy Peña was the World Series MVP. The 25-year-old star born in the Dominican Republic also was MVP of the AL Championship Series. Houston starter Framer Valdez won his second game in this World Series.","image":[{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"ImageObject","height":653,"thumbnailUrl":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/ac4cf6a/2147483647/strip/false/crop/3000x2000+0+0/resize/980x653!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fstorage.googleapis.com%2Fafs-prod%2Fmedia%2F18d51bbcd31542589a41bb7a5f1d4835%2F3000.jpeg","url":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/ac4cf6a/2147483647/strip/false/crop/3000x2000+0+0/resize/980x653!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fstorage.googleapis.com%2Fafs-prod%2Fmedia%2F18d51bbcd31542589a41bb7a5f1d4835%2F3000.jpeg","width":980}],"name":"Alvarez blasts Baker, Astros to World Series title vs Phils | AP News","mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://apnews.com/article/houston-astros-world-series-champions-phillies-af94071eece8c17cb91322a0bd398cd9"},"author":[{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"Person","name":"Stephen Hawkins"}],"publisher":{"@type":"Organization","name":"AP News","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://assets.apnews.com/19/66/bc546486408c8595f01753a9fbeb/ap-logo-176-by-208.svg"}},"keywords":["MLB","Yordan Alvarez","Baseball","Philadelphia Phillies","Framber Valdez","Houston Astros","Houston","Dusty Baker","Zack Wheeler","Chicago White Sox","Trending News","Sports"],"thumbnailUrl":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/ac4cf6a/2147483647/strip/false/crop/3000x2000+0+0/resize/980x653!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fstorage.googleapis.com%2Fafs-prod%2Fmedia%2F18d51bbcd31542589a41bb7a5f1d4835%2F3000.jpeg","headline":"Alvarez blasts Baker, Astros to World Series title vs Phils"}]

title: Heat coach says Ball should have been ejected for injuring Adebayo | AP News
og:description: Miami coach Erik Spoelstra says LaMelo Ball should have been ejected for tripping Bam Adebayo, leading to a lower back injury that knocked the Heat’s star center out of Tuesday night’s 127-126 play-in tournament loss to the Charlotte Hornets.
og:title: Bam Adebayo injured after LaMelo Ball trips him. Heat coach says Ball should have been ejected
jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/heat-bam-adebayo-injury-hornets-cf25f92b776edc3e7f6be31c9a94f42e","dateModified":"2026-04-15T04:16:08Z","datePublished":"2026-04-15T00:37:09Z","description":"Miami coach Erik Spoelstra says LaMelo Ball should have been ejected for tripping Bam Adebayo, leading to a lower back injury that knocked the Heat’s star center out of Tuesday night’s 127-126 play-in tournament loss to the Charlotte Hornets. Ball fell to the floor after missing a shot on a drive to the basket early in the second quarter, and he appeared to reach out with his left arm and grab Adebayo’s left leg, causing the big man to fall. Spoelstra says “there's no place in the game” for actions like that. Ball apologized but said he was disoriented after getting hit in the head.","image":[{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"ImageObject","height":653,"thumbnailUrl":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/ecd5caa/2147483647/strip/false/crop/4000x2667+0+0/resize/980x653!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.apnews.com%2F09%2F69%2F77f5b2d8309079c06f9c62cfc167%2Fe02a93bde6954d409eede7a84712826e","url":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/ecd5caa/2147483647/strip/false/crop/4000x2667+0+0/resize/980x653!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.apnews.com%2F09%2F69%2F77f5b2d8309079c06f9c62cfc167%2Fe02a93bde6954d409eede7a84712826e","width":980}],"name":"Heat coach says Ball should have been ejected for injuring Adebayo | AP News","mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://apnews.com/article/heat-bam-adebayo-injury-hornets-cf25f92b776edc3e7f6be31c9a94f42e"},"author":[{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"Person","jobTitle":"AP Sports Writer","name":"Steve Reed","url":"https://apnews.com/author/steve-reed"}],"publisher":{"@type":"Organization","name":"AP News","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://assets.apnews.com/19/66/bc546486408c8595f01753a9fbeb/ap-logo-176-by-208.svg"}},"articleSection":["Sports"],"keywords":["Bam Adebayo","Erik Spoelstra","Tyler Herro","LaMelo Ball","Davion Mitchell","Andrew Wiggins","Charlotte Hornets","Miami Heat","Basketball","Florida","FL State Wire","NC State Wire","NBA","North Carolina","heat bam adebayo injury hornets","Sports","NBA basketball","Zach Zarba"],"thumbnailUrl":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/ecd5caa/2147483647/strip/false/crop/4000x2667+0+0/resize/980x653!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.apnews.com%2F09%2F69%2F77f5b2d8309079c06f9c62cfc167%2Fe02a93bde6954d409eede7a84712826e","headline":"Heat coach says Ball should have been ejected for injuring Adebayo"}]

og:description: Longtime Los Angeles Dodgers executive Lon Rosen is moving into the Los Angeles Lakers’ front office in the latest significant change for the 17-time NBA champion organization following its sale last year.
og:title: Longtime Dodgers executive Lon Rosen becomes Lakers' president of business operations

title: Toby Fournier secures a double-double and No. 13 Duke women beat Clemson 60-46 in ACC quarterfinals | AP News
og:description: Toby Fournier had 17 points, 10 rebounds and three blocks, Delaney Thomas added 14 points, and No. 13 Duke cruised past Clemson 60-46 in the Atlantic Coast Conference Tournament quarterfinals.
og:title: Toby Fournier secures a double-double and No. 13 Duke women beat Clemson 60-46 in ACC quarterfinals
jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/clemson-duke-score-342e72668c5eefa28163db5bc0c8074d","dateModified":"2026-03-06T18:15:56Z","datePublished":"2026-03-06T18:15:56Z","description":"Toby Fournier had 17 points, 10 rebounds and three blocks, Delaney Thomas added 14 points, and No. 13 Duke cruised past Clemson 60-46 in the Atlantic Coast Conference Tournament quarterfinals. The defense for top-seeded Duke (22-8) stunned Clemson (21-11) in the first half, forcing 11 turnovers and four shot-clock violations. The Blue Devils responded on offense, going 5 of 9 beyond the 3-point arc and 14 of 30 from the field against the same team that upset them 53-51 merely 12 days ago. Duke went on a 10-0 run late in the second quarter to extend its lead to 38-19 at the half. Fournier had 12 points in the first half. Clemson turned a 25-point deficit to 13 within the final minutes of the game, but Duke closed it out.","image":[{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"ImageObject","height":622,"thumbnailUrl":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/4e3ea84/2147483647/strip/false/crop/5236x3324+0+0/resize/980x622!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.apnews.com%2F6b%2F69%2Fa043dde4b54477e9384d49a86832%2Fd39e484c942c4343a3bac166b5ac2434","url":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/4e3ea84/2147483647/strip/false/crop/5236x3324+0+0/resize/980x622!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.apnews.com%2F6b%2F69%2Fa043dde4b54477e9384d49a86832%2Fd39e484c942c4343a3bac166b5ac2434","width":980}],"name":"Toby Fournier secures a double-double and No. 13 Duke women beat Clemson 60-46 in ACC quarterfinals | AP News","mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://apnews.com/article/clemson-duke-score-342e72668c5eefa28163db5bc0c8074d"},"author":[{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"Person","description":"Carey runs the live blog for AP's Top 25 college football poll every week. title: Faith-based AI apps include chatbots imitating Jesus and Buddha | AP News
og:description: The faith-based AI market is expanding, with tools for various religions. For example, there's an AI Jesus that — for $1.99 per minute — will offer words of prayer and encouragement.
og:title: From 'BuddhaBot' to $1.99 chats with AI Jesus, the faith-based tech boom is here
jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/religious-chatbots-ai-technology-jesus-buddhabot-e1ed4832b25a23ee85292da681a0ec37","dateModified":"2026-04-11T16:42:52Z","datePublished":"2026-04-10T11:04:08Z","description":"The faith-based AI market is expanding, with tools for various religions. For example, there's an AI Jesus that — for $1.99 per minute — will offer words of prayer and encouragement. As AI tools designed with religion in mind become increasingly common, many are reckoning with how these technologies shape their relationship to faith and spiritual guidance. title: LaMelo Ball's layup with 4.7 seconds lifts Hornets past Heat in OT | AP News
og:description: LaMelo Ball made a layup with 4.7 seconds left in overtime, Miles Bridges blocked Davion Mitchell’s attempt at a winning layup at the buzzer, and the Charlotte Hornets beat Miami 127-126 in a wild start to the NBA’s play-in games, eliminating the Heat from the playoffs.
og:title: LaMelo Ball's layup, Miles Bridges' block at buzzer give Hornets 127-126 win over Heat in play-in
jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/heat-hornets-score-869a63def0dfcf379df7a96507469386","dateModified":"2026-04-15T02:50:46Z","datePublished":"2026-04-15T02:39:44Z","description":"LaMelo Ball made a layup with 4.7 seconds left in overtime, Miles Bridges blocked Davion Mitchell’s attempt at a winning layup at the buzzer, and the Charlotte Hornets beat Miami 127-126 in a wild start to the NBA’s play-in games, eliminating the Heat from the playoffs. Ball finished with 30 points and 10 assists and Bridges had 28 points and nine rebounds as the Hornets won their first postseason home game in a decade. Coby White had 19 points, including a turnaround 3 with 10.8 second left in regulation to send the game to OT. The Heat Heat lost Bam Adebayo to a lower back injury when Ball tripped him in the second quarter.","image":[{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"ImageObject","height":654,"thumbnailUrl":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/d571f78/2147483647/strip/false/crop/4652x3103+0+0/resize/980x654!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.apnews.com%2F18%2Fa1%2F82783fc61c68a48302bb788782de%2Fad2108baf00f4499b6da6b247075c719","url":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/d571f78/2147483647/strip/false/crop/4652x3103+0+0/resize/980x654!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.apnews.com%2F18%2Fa1%2F82783fc61c68a48302bb788782de%2Fad2108baf00f4499b6da6b247075c719","width":980}],"name":"LaMelo Ball's layup with 4.7 seconds lifts Hornets past Heat in OT | AP News","mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://apnews.com/article/heat-hornets-score-869a63def0dfcf379df7a96507469386"},"author":[{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"Person","jobTitle":"AP Sports Writer","name":"Steve Reed","url":"https://apnews.com/author/steve-reed"}],"publisher":{"@type":"Organization","name":"AP News","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://assets.apnews.com/19/66/bc546486408c8595f01753a9fbeb/ap-logo-176-by-208.svg"}},"articleSection":["Sports"],"keywords":["Davion Mitchell","Bam Adebayo","Miles Bridges","LaMelo Ball","Coby White","Tyler Herro","Miami Heat","Charlotte Hornets","Basketball","Andrew Wiggins","NBA Playoffs","Florida","FL State Wire","NC State Wire","NBA","North Carolina","heat hornets score","Charlotte","Sports","NBA basketball"],"thumbnailUrl":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/d571f78/2147483647/strip/false/crop/4652x3103+0+0/resize/980x654!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.apnews.com%2F18%2Fa1%2F82783fc61c68a48302bb788782de%2Fad2108baf00f4499b6da6b247075c719","headline":"LaMelo Ball's layup with 4.7 seconds lifts Hornets past Heat in OT"}]

og:description: A raffle in France offers the chance to win a Picasso portrait for a 100-euro ticket. Proceeds will support Alzheimer's research.

jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/france-picasso-alzheimers-raffle-f32c1c86c6b2e367272f50ea1b7a891c","dateModified":"2026-04-10T15:36:09Z","datePublished":"2026-04-10T13:03:31Z","description":"A raffle in France offers the chance to win a Picasso portrait for a 100-euro ticket. title: Los Angeles Lakers star Luka Doncic suspended for 1 game by NBA after his 16th technical foul | AP News
og:description: Luka Doncic was suspended one game by the NBA after picking up his 16th technical foul of the season.
og:title: Lakers’ Luka Doncic suspended for 1 game by NBA after his 16th technical foul
jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/lakers-luka-doncic-suspended-5d1c346906c099b67d4489d642d4d571","dateModified":"2026-03-28T23:06:28Z","datePublished":"2026-03-28T23:06:28Z","description":"Luka Doncic was suspended one game by the NBA after picking up his 16th technical foul of the season. The league announced on that Doncic was suspended after a scuffle in the Lakers’ win over Brooklyn on Friday night. Ziaire Williams yelled in Doncic’s space after an offensive foul call. Doncic pushed Williams’ arm and Williams swiped across Doncic’s face. Officials reviewed the play and gave both players technicals. Under NBA rules, the 16th technical triggers an automatic suspension without pay. Doncic said he tried to leave and did not say anything to Williams.","image":[{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"ImageObject","height":653,"thumbnailUrl":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/36f2ae6/2147483647/strip/false/crop/6621x4414+0+0/resize/980x653!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.apnews.com%2Ff5%2Fe1%2Fc3f204db97e780912f91cb0907a6%2F7df2d8f61e81451094cd0978b7686914","url":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/36f2ae6/2147483647/strip/false/crop/6621x4414+0+0/resize/980x653!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.apnews.com%2Ff5%2Fe1%2Fc3f204db97e780912f91cb0907a6%2F7df2d8f61e81451094cd0978b7686914","width":980}],"name":"Los Angeles Lakers star Luka Doncic suspended for 1 game by NBA after his 16th technical foul | AP News","mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://apnews.com/article/lakers-luka-doncic-suspended-5d1c346906c099b67d4489d642d4d571"},"publisher":{"@type":"Organization","name":"AP News","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://assets.apnews.com/19/66/bc546486408c8595f01753a9fbeb/ap-logo-176-by-208.svg"}},"articleSection":["Sports"],"keywords":["Goga Bitadze","Ziaire Williams","Luka Doncic","Los Angeles Lakers","NBA","New York City","California","New York","lakers luka doncic suspended","Sports officiating","Sports","NBA basketball"],"thumbnailUrl":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/36f2ae6/2147483647/strip/false/crop/6621x4414+0+0/resize/980x653!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.apnews.com%2Ff5%2Fe1%2Fc3f204db97e780912f91cb0907a6%2F7df2d8f61e81451094cd0978b7686914","headline":"Los Angeles Lakers star Luka Doncic suspended for 1 game by NBA after his 16th technical foul"}]

jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/vatican-pope-ai-artificial-intelligence-9805fec11681adbf88d3a7c73bdf47de","dateModified":"2023-12-14T22:10:22Z","datePublished":"2023-12-14T10:35:09Z","description":"Pope Francis is calling for an international treaty to ensure artificial intelligence is developed and used ethically. title: What's in a name? Pope Leo XIV's choice signals a commitment to social justice | AP News
og:description: Pope Leo XIV's choice of name signals a commitment to social justice, very much in line with the late Pope Francis’ global ministry.
og:title: What's in a name? Pope Leo XIV's choice signals a commitment to social justice
jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/pope-conclave-vatican-name-77c4f1d0f7a6e1bf68f06679b6a55a43","dateModified":"2025-05-09T08:43:35Z","datePublished":"2025-05-08T18:57:54Z","description":"Pope Leo XIV's choice of name signals a commitment to social justice, very much in line with the late Pope Francis’ global ministry. Pope Leo XIII laid the foundation for modern Catholic social thought, most famously with his 1891 encyclical Rerum Novarum, which addressed workers’ rights and capitalism at the dawn of the industrial age. He criticized both laissez-faire capitalism and state-centric socialism, giving shape to a distinctly Catholic vein of economic teaching. Natalia Imperatori-Lee, chair of religious studies at Manhattan University, said that the name “is a deep sign of commitment to social issues — I think it is going to be exciting to see a different kind of American Catholicism in Rome.''","image":[{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"ImageObject","height":980,"thumbnailUrl":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/4f9bee0/2147483647/strip/false/crop/2152x3228+0+0/resize/653x980!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.apnews.com%2Fde%2F19%2F32bc3a8182b8e1b0c4374659b48f%2F652aba06d53f4c5d9b69d20b62204a44","url":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/4f9bee0/2147483647/strip/false/crop/2152x3228+0+0/resize/653x980!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.apnews.com%2Fde%2F19%2F32bc3a8182b8e1b0c4374659b48f%2F652aba06d53f4c5d9b69d20b62204a44","width":653}],"name":"What's in a name? title: Mourners bid farewell to Pope Francis in a funeral in St. Peter's Square | AP News
og:description: World leaders and rank-and-file Catholic faithful have said farewell to Pope Francis in a funeral that highlighted his concern for people on the peripheries and reflected his wish to be remembered as a simple pastor.
og:title: Mighty and meek say farewell to Pope Francis during Vatican funeral and last popemobile ride
jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/pope-francis-vatican-funeral-d6a8a471978c21c71c3f1dc07f663e78","dateModified":"2025-04-26T18:18:09Z","datePublished":"2025-04-26T04:35:54Z","description":"World leaders and rank-and-file Catholic faithful have said farewell to Pope Francis in a funeral that highlighted his concern for people on the peripheries and reflected his wish to be remembered as a simple pastor. Though presidents and princes attended the Mass in St. Peter’s Square on Saturday, prisoners and migrants welcomed Francis’ coffin at his final resting place in a basilica across town. According to Vatican estimates, some 250,000 people flocked to the funeral Mass at the Vatican and 150,000 more lined the motorcade route through downtown Rome to witness the first funeral procession for a pope in a century. They clapped and cheered “Papa Francesco” as his simple wooden coffin traveled aboard a modified popemobile to St. Mary Major Basilica.","image":[{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"ImageObject","height":653,"thumbnailUrl":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/cebfd5b/2147483647/strip/false/crop/7000x4667+0+0/resize/980x653!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.apnews.com%2F5a%2F1f%2F1a5ba88858aaace90de66fbddc62%2F8957eafc065b4f19b28681b86bc9e2ef","url":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/cebfd5b/2147483647/strip/false/crop/7000x4667+0+0/resize/980x653!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.apnews.com%2F5a%2F1f%2F1a5ba88858aaace90de66fbddc62%2F8957eafc065b4f19b28681b86bc9e2ef","width":980}],"name":"Mourners bid farewell to Pope Francis in a funeral in St. Peter's Square | AP News","mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://apnews.com/article/pope-francis-vatican-funeral-d6a8a471978c21c71c3f1dc07f663e78"},"author":[{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"Person","description":"Winfield has been on the Vatican beat since 2001, covering the papacies of St. John Paul II, Pope Benedict XVI and the Francis pontificate and traveling the world with them.","image":{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://assets.apnews.com/00/93/5329cbde4bfabb1d4640cdc05e63/winfield-nicole-1.jpg"},"jobTitle":"Chief correspondent, Italy and Vatican","name":"Nicole Winfield","url":"https://apnews.com/author/nicole-winfield"},{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"Person","description":"Barry covers all things Italy for The Associated Press. jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/vatican-new-pope-leo-xiv-robert-prevost-order-st-augustine-d803636fad69fe4d4c919181fc5ad5c1","dateModified":"2025-05-08T21:21:52Z","datePublished":"2025-05-08T18:47:09Z","description":"Cardinal Robert Prevost, the first U.S. pope in the 2,000-year history of the Catholic Church, previously led a Catholic religious order. The religious order was formed in the 13th century as a community of “mendicant” friars — dedicated to poverty, service and evangelization. title: LeBron James ties Robert Parish's NBA record for games played | AP News
og:description: LeBron James started for the Los Angeles Lakers against the Miami Heat, making it the 1,611th regular-season game of his career and tying Robert Parish’s all-time NBA mark.
og:title: Another record for LeBron: He ties Robert Parish by appearing in his 1,611th NBA regular-season game

title: The new pope's name could signal his priorities | AP News
og:description: The first clue of the next pope's direction will be the name he chooses. Popes used their given names for most of the Catholic Church’s first millennium.
og:title: What name the new pope chooses can signal what's ahead
jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/pope-name-francis-conclave-be3bdd5b945f7f7166d0b0f3c5601008","dateModified":"2025-05-06T06:53:44Z","datePublished":"2025-05-06T06:41:21Z","description":"The first clue of the next pope's direction will be the name he chooses. Popes used their given names for most of the Catholic Church’s first millennium. But in the mid-20th century, new popes began to choose names signaling the aim of their papacy. A new pope is free to choose a name never used before, as Francis did. A Pope Francis II would signify continuity with the late pontiff’s pastoral legacy and his prioritizing of the marginalized. The most popular papal name of the 20th century, Pius, would be a clear signal that a traditionalist is taking charge.","image":[{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"ImageObject","height":727,"thumbnailUrl":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/18bc474/2147483647/strip/false/crop/3438x2550+0+0/resize/980x727!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.apnews.com%2Fa8%2F03%2F255291e480c4336b651e80fe6a45%2Fd3966497aabd453cba8915cada61cd70","url":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/18bc474/2147483647/strip/false/crop/3438x2550+0+0/resize/980x727!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.apnews.com%2Fa8%2F03%2F255291e480c4336b651e80fe6a45%2Fd3966497aabd453cba8915cada61cd70","width":980}],"name":"The new pope's name could signal his priorities | AP News","mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://apnews.com/article/pope-name-francis-conclave-be3bdd5b945f7f7166d0b0f3c5601008"},"author":[{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"Person","description":"Barry covers all things Italy for The Associated Press. title: About 250,000 mourners pay last respects to Pope Francis over 3 days of public viewing | AP News
og:description: Three days of public viewing of Pope Francis’ body by ordinary mourners and statesmen alike have ended and the pontiff's coffin sealed.
og:title: About 250,000 mourners pay last respects to Pope Francis over 3 days of public viewing
jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/italy-vatican-pope-funeral-dignitaries-b8c206d03e3535b8ee3b18d42667b803","dateModified":"2025-04-25T22:30:47Z","datePublished":"2025-04-25T04:07:48Z","description":"Three days of public viewing of Pope Francis’ body by ordinary mourners and statesmen alike have ended and the pontiff's coffin sealed. Francis died on Monday at age 88 after suffering a stroke. The Vatican said Friday that around 250,000 mourners filed through St. Peter’s Basilica over the three days to pay their last respects as Francis lay in state in a simple wooden coffin. Hundreds of disappointed people were turned away when authorities closed St. Peter’s Square hours before the viewing period ended.
